programme.title: Wildest Africa: Lake Turkana: Land of the Crocodile
programme.desc: The largest of Africa's Rift valley lakes, Lake Turkana is at the heart of one of the harshest landscapes on the planet. Despite its hostile environment, man and beast have both worked out a way to survive.
programme.sub-title: Lake Turkana: Land of the Crocodile

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Mount Kenya: African Heart of Ice
programme.desc: Mount Kenya soars over 5km into the air. It is the second highest mountain in Africa. At its summit, temperatures fluctuate from over 30 degrees celsius to below freezing.
programme.sub-title: Mount Kenya: African Heart of Ice

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Virungas: Land of Ice and Fire
programme.desc: It's home to some of the world's most iconic animals  including the African great apes.
programme.sub-title: Virungas: Land of Ice and Fire

programme.title: Wildest India: The Himalayas: Surviving the Summits
programme.desc: The Himalayas run across 2,500km of north India. he Himalayas' rugged highlands offer little direct refuge to humans, in the shadow below, over a billion people in India rely on the mountains for survival.

programme.title: Wildest India: Ganges: River of Life
programme.desc: Then watch, the longest river in India, The Ganges. It's a lifeline to wild animals, from rhinoceros and river dolphins to otters and gharials.

programme.title: Wildest India: India's Lost World
programme.desc: North-east India is an anthropological paradise; there is no other place on Earth with so many different ethnic groups. The forest are filled with mysterious tribes whose lives are dictated by the rain and the seasonal fruits of the forest.

programme.title: Wildest India: Western Ghats: Monsoon Mountains
programme.desc: See how the Himalayas run across 2,500km of north India.The Himalayas' highlands offer little direct refuge to humans. /Then, learn about the western Ghats. A spine of mountains that lay claim to being one of the most bio-diverse places in the world.

programme.title: Wildest India: Thar Desert: Sacred Sands
programme.desc: Covering 200,000 km sq, India's Thar desert is one of the harshest places on Earth. Desiccating winds and near permanent drought has earned this unforgiving land another name: the region of death.

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Venezuela: The Treasure of El Dorado
programme.desc: Venezuela is famous for its lost worlds, its forbidding mountains, huge swamps, and impenetrable jungles, all seemingly cut off in space and time. Yet each is linked, by the mighty river: the Orinoco, the rumoured route to El Dorado, city of gold.
programme.sub-title: Venezuela: The Treasure of El Dorado

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: The Andes: World in the Clouds
programme.desc: The longest chain of mountains in the world, the Andes run the length of western South America and dictate the climate for the whole continent. They include some of the highest peaks outside the Himalayas.
programme.sub-title: The Andes: World in the Clouds

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Pantanal: Brazil's Wild Heart
programme.desc: Every year the Pantanal is drowned by immense floods, and then suffer severe drought. Yet, while people struggle, the Pantanal hosts some of the greatest gatherings of animals on the planet.

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Patagonia: The Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: Patagonia is a place of extremes  of vast ice fields and snow-capped mountains; of windswept deserts, and violent oceans. Survival here means being tough enough to cope with brutal winters, and canny enough to exploit brief seasons of plenty.
programme.sub-title: Patagonia: The Ends of the Earth

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Amazon: One Jungle, Many Worlds
programme.desc: The Amazon is the largest rainforest in the world, and the richest ecosystem on earth. This film uncovers what makes the Amazon such a powerhouse of evolution; how it has come to home a third of all species on the planet.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Sahara: Life on the Edge
programme.desc: Watch Africa's Cape Coast that goes from the frigid waters of Cape Point to the sub-tropic seas of Kwazulu-Natal./After, see Africa's Dark Heart in the Congo which is seething with innumerable species./Last,learn about the largest desert in the world.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Zambezi: Wild Water
programme.desc: The Zambezi is one of Africa's most influential rivers. It supports some of the continent's most spectacular wildlife. However, the Zambezi's long and winding journey destroys, as well as creates.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Ethiopia: Land of Extremes
programme.desc: Landlocked and surrounded by five countries, Ethiopia is one of east Africa's forgotten lands. Seemingly passive deserts in fact seethe with fire, and cloud-piercing peaks shield a secret Eden of canyons and cliff-tops teeming with life.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Madagascar: Islands of Monsters
programme.desc: Madagascar is truly a weird and wonderful land. Isolated on an island of extreme and magical looking locations, life has adapted and diversified. With few predators, numbers have proliferated and natural selection has gone mad.

programme.title: The Silver Brumby
programme.desc: In the unforgiving wilderness of the Australian Alps, there roams a stallion like no other, the Silver Brumby. Now, one horseman sets off on an unforgettable adventure to capture the horse that according to legend, could never be tamed.

programme.title: Black or White
programme.desc: A heart-wrenching drama starring Academy Award Winners Octavia Spencer and Kevin Costner. When Elliot is left to care for his granddaughter Eloise by himself, Eloise’s paternal grandmother seeks custody, drawing them into a long and uncertain battle.

programme.title: The Glass Castle
programme.desc: Based on the worldwide best-selling memoir starring Academy Award® winner Brie Larson and Academy Award® nominees Woody Harrelson and Naomi Watts, THE GLASS CASTLE chronicles the adventures of an eccentric, resilient, tight-knit family.

programme.title: Anna Karenina
programme.desc: Anna is a wife and mother who has an affair with the handsome Count Vronsky. Based on the novel by Tolstoy. Starring: Sophie Marceau, Sean Bean, Alfred Molina, James Fox

programme.title: She's Funny That Way
programme.desc: A married Broadway director falls for a call-girl-turned-actress and works to help her advance her career, but things get a little more complicated than they bargained for.

programme.title: Heartbreakers
programme.desc: Max and Page are a brilliant mother and daughter con team who have their gift down to a fine art.

programme.title: Traffic
programme.desc: A conservative judge is appointed by the President to spearhead America's escalating war against drugs, only to discover that his teenage daughter is an addict.

programme.title: Legendary
programme.desc: Cal Chetley is a bright, engaging, undersized fifteen year-old who's been picked on most of his life. Cal joins his high school wrestling team in the hopes his brother will train him. More importantly, Cal uses wrestling as the tool to reunite his family.

programme.title: Time of the Wolf
programme.desc: After the death of his parents, Aaron has to live on the remote ranch of his distant aunt and uncle. Uncommunicative relatives and the cruelty he suffers from at his new school let him turn to a friendship with a wolf cub orphaned by local farmers.

programme.title: Jungle Goddess
programme.desc: Jungle Goddess: An heiress stranded in Africa is made queen of the jungle in the feature film and Bela Lugosi stars in the short The Phantom Creeps.

programme.title: Untamed Youth
programme.desc: Joel invents a pipe with a smoke detector and a sprinkler system built in for the invention exchange. The guys watch a 1950s teen flick about youths sentenced to manual labor at a cotton farm.

programme.title: The Crawling Eye
programme.desc: Things start to look eerily familiar to scientists Crevett and Brooks when mountain climbers begin losing their heads in the Trollenberg Mountains.

programme.title: The Phantom Planet
programme.desc: When US astronaut Captain Frank Chapman’s military spaceship is damaged by asteroids, he lands safely on the giant asteroid Rheton.

programme.title: The Human Duplicators
programme.desc: An alien takes over a professor's mansion-basement laboratory, and makes android clones to infiltrate the government.

programme.title: Outlaw of Gor
programme.desc: A hero and loser friend are transplanted to the planet of Gor by mysterious forces and are soon caught up in an evil sorcerer's plot of dastardly evil.

programme.title: The Wild Wild World of Batwoman
programme.desc: In this lower-than-low budget film, Batwoman enlists her band of go-go dancing Batgirls to protect the Atomic Hearing Aid from the rotten Rat Fink.

programme.title: The Beatniks
programme.desc: When a hold-up carried out by his hoodlum friends goes tragically awry, Eddie Crane’s bright future as a recording artist could be in jeopardy.

programme.title: The Unearthly
programme.desc: A mad scientist creates havoc when an experiment to stop the aging process goes awry.

programme.title: The Sword And The Dragon
programme.desc: A Russian hero plots an invasion against the Mongols in The Sword and the Dragon. Mike and the Bots create their own topical comedy show, reenact the table cloth scene from the movie, and try their hand at playing Dungeons and Dragons.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Bird Brains / The Real Vincent
programme.desc: Squirt is eager to assist his idol, Dr. Sapstein on his latest quest for the rare mocker bird.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Messy Bessie / Nanny Num Nums
programme.desc: The campers build a race car to help Sawyer relive his pro-racing days.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Ice Queen / Live and Let Squatch
programme.desc: When the campers try to reclaim their stolen Lakebottom items.
programme.sub-title: Ice Queen / Live and Let Squatch

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: The Day Squirt Stood Still / Anti Gravity
programme.desc: The campers track down a UFO inhabited by an alien from the planet Squipiter.
programme.sub-title: The Day Squirt Stood Still / Anti Gravity

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Cluck of the Were-Chicken / Gnome Force
programme.desc: When a hulking were-chicken stalks the camp, McGee must lead the hunt to prove his innocence.
programme.sub-title: Cluck of the Were-Chicken / Gnome Force

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: McGee the Mermaid / Welcome to Buttcon
programme.desc: The kids accidentally resurrect an evil mermaid who floods the camp.
programme.sub-title: McGee the Mermaid / Welcome to Buttcon

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: S.P.U.D.S / Monster Hunters "R" Us
programme.desc: McGee, Gretchen and Squirt disturb the potato King!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Late Afternoon of the Living Gitch / Mindsuckers from the Depths
programme.desc: When Squirt's stinky underwear is washed in toxic cleanser, the gitch comes alive.
programme.sub-title: Late Afternoon of the Living Gitch / Mindsuckers from the Depths

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Fright Club / Bottomdome
programme.desc: The campers discover an enchanted flashlight.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Are You My Mommy? / Slimey Come Home
programme.desc: The Campers and Buttsquat come across an ancient pyramid inhabited by mummy's.
programme.sub-title: Are You My Mommy? / Slimey Come Home

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Marshmallow Madness / 28 Suzi's Later
programme.desc: Armand goes into a feeding frenzy when wild marshmallows give the campers a rash.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Who's Ghouling Who? / The Adominable Dr. Squatch
programme.desc: McGee accidentally summons Percy, a ghost with a very 'fiery' personality.
programme.sub-title: Who's Ghouling Who? / The Adominable Dr. Squatch

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Bloody Marty / Ghost In The Mower
programme.desc: The kids ignore Rosebuds warning and summon Bloody Marty from the ominous mirror world.
programme.sub-title: Bloody Marty / Ghost In The Mower

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Lakebo-tron / Rise of the Dawn of the Beginning of the Planet of Armand!
programme.desc: McGee and Buttsquat go head-to-head in an 80's style arcade game! But as the points build up, the boys become digitized inside the game. The kids head back through the Lakebottom inter-dimensional portal, hoping to find a Sasquatch version of the camp.
programme.sub-title: Lakebo-tron / Rise of the Dawn of the Beginning of the Planet of Armand!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Golfadoom / There is Something About Mamba
programme.desc: McGee, Gretchen and Buttsquat must beat Haggis MacJockstrap in golf!
programme.sub-title: Golfadoom / There is Something About Mamba

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Jaws of Old Toothy / Arachnattack
programme.desc: When Sawyer closes the beach because of a giant fish, McGee vows to rid the lake of "Old Toothy".

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: The Superfantastic Mega-Buds / It Came From My Nose
programme.desc: McGee, Gretchen and Squirt get super fantastic mega powers!
programme.sub-title: The Superfantastic Mega-Buds / It Came From My Nose

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Itchy Witchy Pizza Project / Breakout From Buttvault B
programme.desc: Gretchen, McGee and Squirt get trapped by witch who forces the campers into pizza slave labour.
programme.sub-title: Itchy Witchy Pizza Project / Breakout From Buttvault B

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Tooth Troll / Hive and Seek
programme.desc: Squirt is captured by a Tooth Troll!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Meet The Gretch's Parents / Now with 100% More Portal
programme.desc: McGee and Squirt are flabbergasted when Gretchen's parents turn out to be the famous action-star couple, the Gritchersons! The kids discover an interdimensional portal to travel back and forth between parallel Lakebottom dimensions.
programme.sub-title: Meet The Gretch's Parents / Now with 100% More Portal

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Terror form the Toybox / Slimeball Run
programme.desc: Buttsquat's Teddy Bear washes up at Camp Lakebottom and hypnotizes the Bottom Dwellers.
programme.sub-title: Terror form the Toybox / Slimeball Run

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Slaybells / Smells Like Holidays
programme.desc: The kids almost ruin the biggest monster holiday of the year!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Mc Crossroads / Lucky Duck
programme.desc: McGee signs a contract with Sheba the bandshee.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Camp Lockdownbottom / All You Need is Larva
programme.desc: Rosebud is sick of everyone borrowing her stuff, and draws the line when her precious golden ladle goes missing. After eating raw cookie dough, Squirt develops a case of worms!
programme.sub-title: Camp Lockdownbottom / All You Need is Larva

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Big Top Terror / Slimal Fear
programme.desc: The campers summon Armand's old rival, Doofus the clown who vows to destroy the campers.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Last Days / Knock on Wood
programme.desc: McGee tries to save Camp Lakebottom from being overtaken by the Grim Camper.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Butt-Squad / You Sank My Battle-Squirt!
programme.desc: Buttsquat steps in to help the bottomdwellers when they suddenly acquire the same red hair and freckles as their Sunny Smiles nemesis. When an alien invasion threatens Camp Lakebottom, the kids defend the camp against the alien mothership!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Hiccups / Boogeyman Fever
programme.desc: Things start disappearing around Lakebottom!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Cheeks of Dread / Doo Doo Doomsday
programme.desc: Gretchen must confront her greatest and cutest fear.
programme.sub-title: Cheeks of Dread / Doo Doo Doomsday

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Adventures in Bottomland / Golem My Way?
programme.desc: During an unfair polo match, McGee falls down an armadillo and wakes up in 'Bottomland.'
programme.sub-title: Adventures in Bottomland / Golem My Way?

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Ants In Our Camp / Fanboy Freakout
programme.desc: McGee mistakenly concocts a spray that shrinks the campers to a microscopic size.
programme.sub-title: Ants In Our Camp / Fanboy Freakout

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Ring Around The Gretchen / Chilli Con Carnage
programme.desc: Beauty pageant Gretchen looks to connect with her girly side.
programme.sub-title: Ring Around The Gretchen / Chilli Con Carnage

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Camp Plantbottom / Game Over
programme.desc: It's Suzi's birthday and McGee ate her gift!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Red Drawn / Pandora's Jock
programme.desc: A travelling salesman visits Lakebottom one boring rainy day and sells McGee a magic pencil.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Pirate of Ickygloomy / Attack of the 50-Foot Squirt
programme.desc: While playing Pirates on a shipwreck the Bottom Dwellers must battle the ghost Spitbeard the Pirate.
programme.sub-title: Pirate of Ickygloomy / Attack of the 50-Foot Squirt

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Stage Fright / Frankenfixer
programme.desc: The Bottom Dwellers stage Armand's awful play but a jealous Suzi unleashes a curse on the production.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Escape from Lakebottom
programme.desc: McGee, Gretchen and Squirt arrive at Camp Lakebottom to find themselves held captive by a zombie.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Cabin Fever / It's a Horrible Life
programme.desc: While lost in the woods, McGee, Gretchen, Squirt and Sawyer discover a creepy cabin.
programme.sub-title: Cabin Fever / It's a Horrible Life

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Five Diamond World Poker Classic - Part 2
programme.desc: Fresh off his second place finish at Bellagio earlier in the season, Faraz The Toilet Jaka is back in Las Vegas and determined to not come up short once again.
programme.sub-title: WPT Five Diamond World Poker Classic - Part 2

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Southern Poker Championship - Part 1
programme.desc: A bunch of good ol' boys from down south and one New York City lawyer tangle in a high stakes poker match on the banks of the Mississippi.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Southern Poker Championship - Part 2
programme.desc: The action heats up down South as the Alabama Cowboy Hoyt Corkins looks to write his name in the record books by notching his second career WPT title.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT L.A. Poker Classic - Part 1
programme.desc: In Los Angeles money means power and there is plenty of power up for grabs at the final table of the Los Angeles Poker Classic as first and second place both earn over $1,000,000.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Invitational - Part 1
programme.desc: The beautiful reality television star Trishelle Cannatella brightens up this Invitational poker party but her opponents know her beauty comes with brains and more than a little gamble.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Invitational - Part 2
programme.desc: The WPT Invitational has come down to just four players and beautiful reality TV show star Trishelle Cannatella is ready to douse her opponents with a little reality of her own.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Bay 101 Shooting Star
programme.desc: The self proclaimed greatest poker player in the world Phil Hellmuth makes another appearance on the WPT stage in his career long search for the one title that has eluded him  WPT Champion.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Bay 101 Shooting Star
programme.desc: Fast talking and even faster playing Andy Seth starts the night in San Jose California with the chip lead and just four players away from his first WPT title.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Hollywood Poker Open - Part 1 & Part 2
programme.desc: This Hollywood Casino might not be in California but this WPT final table has plenty of star power and a storyline worthy of a Hollywood screenplay.
programme.sub-title: WPT Hollywood Poker Open - Part 1 & Part 2

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Hollywood Poker Open - Part 2
programme.desc: Tensions run high at the Hollywood Casino as Carlos The Matador Mortensen finds himself just two players away from owning nearly every record in the WPT record books.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT World Championship
programme.desc: Season Eight crowns its ultimate champion at Bellagio with a stunningly talented final table. If Shawn The Cannon Buchanan can capture this title he would become not only WPT World Champion but by WPT Player of the Year as well.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Foxwoods World Poker Finals S8
programme.desc: World Poker Tour ignited the global poker boom with a unique television show based on a series of high-stakes tournaments. WPT events turned Gus Hansen into the Great Dane and Daniel Negreanu into Kid Poker, and created dozens of poker-made millionaires.
programme.sub-title: WPT Foxwoods World Poker Finals S8

programme.title: World Poker Tour: World Poker Tour: WPT Premier League - Part 2

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 19
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can mirrors be used to make a death ray? What solutions are effective against skunk smell? Which common objects are bulletproof?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 145
programme.desc: Can you accidentally kill yourself with a bullet that ricochets off three walls? Could a medieval army have used trees to catapult dead bodies over a castle wall?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 64
programme.desc: Myths tested: If a steel cable under high tension snaps, could it cut a human in half? Can sounds and vibrations be recorded into the grooves of ancient pottery?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 9
programme.desc: Myths tested: Was it possible to survive an escape from Alcatraz? Does a duck's quack echo? Does the government implant secret chips in people that stud finders can detect?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 34
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can an unamplified human voice shatter a wine glass? Does a rolling stone gather moss? Can a vacuum cleaner be converted into a jet engine?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 200
programme.desc: Can a trench with perfect 90-degree corners absorb an explosion's shockwave inside the trench better than a trench with rounded corners?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 47
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a deadly crossbow be made from materials available to prison inmates? Can vodka remove the smell of cigarettes from clothes or kill bees like an insecticide?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 33
programme.desc: Myths tested: Could using a phone in a thunderstorm result in being electrocuted? Could a bullet pass through a man's genitals, into a woman's abdomen and subsequently make the woman pregnant?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 60
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can speaker power alone destroy a car? Will driving faster on a bumpy road smooth out the ride?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 216
programme.desc: Is an axe more effective than a gun when you are swarmed by zombies? Can the force of many people bust down a door? Can you escape from a horde of zombies?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 151
programme.desc: Are some types of people more tolerant to pain? Can a BBQ propane tank heat up enough in a fire to launch through a garage roof like a rocket?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 144
programme.desc: Can you skip a car over a lake? Is a toilet seat cleaner than other household items?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 150
programme.desc: Can someone really be knocked out of their socks? Is the force exerted between two cars crashing into each other at 50mph the same as a single car hitting a wall at 50mph?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 20
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can someone survive a multi-story elevator fall by jumping right before the elevator hits the bottom of the shaft? Is it possible to make a hovercraft with a vacuum motor?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 173
programme.desc: Did the Syrians design a water-skimming torpedo as early as the 13th century? If a truckload of wine catches fire, will the bottles blow their corks 100 feet and sound like a machine gun?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 1
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a person be propelled off a toilet seat by dropping a lit cigarette into it when filled with combustible materials? Is running better than walking to keep dry in the rain?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 180
programme.desc: Is it impossible for humans to walk in a straight line without a point of reference? Will binary explosives explode in the case of a fender bender?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 190
programme.desc: Can fireworks really launch a person over a lake? Can the weight of a bird be enough to tip a teetering car off of a cliff? Can a water heater turned on its side be used as a cannon?

programme.title: Fear Factor: A Inverted Water Hang, Fish Quicksand, Tanker Truck Surfing
programme.desc: In one exciting stunt, the contestant is hung upside down under the belly of a helicopter hovering over water. Another stunt has a contestant enter a large tank of water and fish scales.
programme.sub-title: A Inverted Water Hang, Fish Quicksand, Tanker Truck Surfing

programme.title: Fear Factor: A Flatbed To Flatbed, Worm Coffin, The Tumbler
programme.desc: In one stunt from this episode, a contestant lies in a coffin in the ground as night crawlers wiggle over their entire body.
programme.sub-title: A Flatbed To Flatbed, Worm Coffin, The Tumbler

programme.title: Fear Factor: A Dual Box Drop, Milk The Goat, Helicopter Box Escape
programme.desc: Contestants will be placed in a plexiglass box. Contestants race two at a time to see who can be fastest to suck a goat udder. Contestant will be placed standing in a box that is 3 feet wide, 7 feet high and 2 feet deep.
programme.sub-title: A Dual Box Drop, Milk The Goat, Helicopter Box Escape

programme.title: Fear Factor: A Phantom Swing On Freemont Street, Slot Eye Ball, The Luxor Slide
programme.desc: A contestant plays a custom-made slot machine to determine which type of cooked eye pairs they will have to eat. In another stunt, contestants will climb out on the 29th floor window at the Luxor Hotel in Las Vegas.
programme.sub-title: A Phantom Swing On Freemont Street, Slot Eye Ball, The Luxor Slide

programme.title: Fear Factor: A Dual Helicopter Drop, Pot Lock Dinner, Tank Of Dead Mice, Pit Fall
programme.desc: A contestant must enter a cylindrical glass tank filled with water, where dead, frozen mice are then dumped in. Other contestants face disgusting food and more horrors in this episode of Fear Factor.
programme.sub-title: A Dual Helicopter Drop, Pot Lock Dinner, Tank Of Dead Mice, Pit Fall

programme.title: Fear Factor: Extreme Monkey Bars, Leech Coffin, Ham and Eggs Fear Factor Style, Platform Swing, Swim With Chum, Quad Lunch
programme.desc: Contestants hold onto monkey bars, suspended under a helicopter. Contestants search for rubber boots at the bottom of a tank of cut up fish parts. Contestants must run their motorcycles off of a cliff.
programme.sub-title: Extreme Monkey Bars, Leech Coffin, Ham and Eggs Fear Factor Style, Platform Swing, Swim With Chum, Quad Lunch

programme.title: Fear Factor: Semi Circle Flag Snag, Feeding Frenzy With Piranhas, Roulette Spider Eating
programme.desc: A tank is filled with Piranha and pig kidneys, which need to be picked up off using contestants' mouths.
programme.sub-title: Semi Circle Flag Snag, Feeding Frenzy With Piranhas, Roulette Spider Eating

programme.title: Fear Factor: Taxi To Taxi Jump, Roach Coffin, Crain Money Grab, BlackJack Bet
programme.desc: Taxi cabs will be suspended from cranes. A player is placed inside a sealed coffin with thousands of roaches. The contestants will be hung by their ankles from a crane and suspended over a swimming pool.
programme.sub-title: Taxi To Taxi Jump, Roach Coffin, Crain Money Grab, BlackJack Bet

programme.title: Fear Factor: Heli Crawl and Flag Grab, Maggot Madness, Head on Pipe Ramp
programme.desc: Players must transfer cow hooves out of a tank of cod liver oil and into a tank of maggots. A contestant must drive their car at approx. 25mph towards another car in another terrifying stunt.
programme.sub-title: Heli Crawl and Flag Grab, Maggot Madness, Head on Pipe Ramp

programme.title: Fear Factor: Heli Water Drag, Cow Eye Juice, Truck-To-Truck Transfer
programme.desc: Contestants will start this game floating in the water. Contestants compress a cows eye with their mouth, squeezing the juice out of the eye into a glass. Contestant will stand on Euclid dump trucks as they travel down the road.
programme.sub-title: Heli Water Drag, Cow Eye Juice, Truck-To-Truck Transfer

programme.title: Fear Factor: Heli Dunk,Conveyor Belt,Human Hamster Wheel
programme.desc: Helicopter picks up contestant by their ankles then dunks them. Contestants transfer a bunch of Fear Factor items off of a moving conveyer belt and onto a scale. Contestants will stand inside a giant ring above water.

programme.title: Fear Factor: Submerged Bus,Dirty Kitchen,Brain Surgery,Falling Beam Walk
programme.desc: A Contestant must dive into the water and swim down to a submerged city bus. Players are given fifty cow brains with a FF chip hidden inside, and must make the way across a maze of beams in another stunt.
programme.sub-title: Submerged Bus,Dirty Kitchen,Brain Surgery,Falling Beam Walk

programme.title: Fear Factor: Water Sack, Beetle, Roach, Worm Transfer
programme.desc: The contestant is placed in a specially designed clear bag. A tank is filled with millipedes, roaches and worms. Contestant is standing on one of four 8-foot tall 16-foot long Plexiglas walls suspended high above the ground.
programme.sub-title: Water Sack, Beetle, Roach, Worm Transfer

programme.title: Fear Factor: Truck To Helicopter,Table Clearing,Under The Semi
programme.desc: Players will have to clear tables to uncover a three-digit combination written on the glass top and drive a car under a semi truck.
programme.sub-title: Truck To Helicopter,Table Clearing,Under The Semi

programme.title: Fear Factor: Boat Raft Leap Frog,Family Tunnel,Worm Head,Suspended Water Tube
programme.desc: There will be a boat that is towing three rafts. A Plexiglas bottom covered in pig parts. The child stands under a large metal shower-head and pulls a chain. Suspended above the water. The kid must climb through the tubes and traverse.
programme.sub-title: Boat Raft Leap Frog,Family Tunnel,Worm Head,Suspended Water Tube

programme.title: Fear Factor: Boat To Boat Transfer,Worm Wine,Matrix Truck Straddle
programme.desc: Contestants must leap back and forth between boats collecting as many flags as possible as well as spend time in a grape-stomping vat in this episode.
programme.sub-title: Boat To Boat Transfer,Worm Wine,Matrix Truck Straddle

programme.title: Fear Factor: Cable Surfing, Gift Exchange, Lake O'Fire
programme.desc: A contestant must slide down two cables while standing on a small platform and swim underneath a 20 foot by 40-foot grid on fire. One at a time, contestants pick nasty gifts from under a Christmas tree in this festive episode.
programme.sub-title: Cable Surfing, Gift Exchange, Lake O'Fire

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Surely, You Jest, Part 1
programme.desc: When Luna's plan to free Ancient Fairy Dragon falls apart, Regulus must come to her rescue in order to save her and the Spirit World from Zeman's minus curse.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Surely, You Jest, Part 2
programme.desc: Carly sets out hoping to uncover the mystery behind the Crimson Dragon, but after digging up some damaging dirt on the Arcadia Movement, she soon finds herself squaring off in a psychic duel with Sayer.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Mark of the Spider, Part 1
programme.desc: Sayer signs up for a Shadow Duel against a Dark Signer who's out for revenge while Akiza agrees to battle a dark and sinister supermodel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Mark of the Spider, Part 2
programme.desc: As the Dark Signer double duel draws to a climactic close, Carly and Misty unfold a catastrophic card combo that could send Akiza and Sayer to the Netherworld forever.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Mark of the Monkey, Part 1
programme.desc: After Akiza falls into a state of unconsciousness, her father turns to Yusei in a last ditch effort to wake his beloved daughter from her catatonic condition.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Mark of the Monkey, Part 2
programme.desc: As the battle between Signers presses on, Yusei turns to his trusty Stardust Dragon in an effort to keep the power of Akiza's Black Rose Dragon at bay.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Mark of the Monkey, Part 3
programme.desc: With Yusei, Jack, Akiza and Luna all gathered together, Director Goodwin seizes the moment and decides to shed some light on the dark and formidable foes the four Signers will soon be battling.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Mark of the Monkey, Part 4
programme.desc: In an effort to rid the Satellite Sector of the Dark Signers, Crow ventures out and challenges a sinister looking sneak to a duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: A Whale of a Ride, Part 1
programme.desc: Crow challenges the newest member of the Dark Signers to a Turbo Duel, but before Crow's Blackwings can even take flight, his opponent unleashes an aerial assault of his own.
programme.sub-title: A Whale of a Ride, Part 1

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: A Whale of a Ride, Part 2
programme.desc: As the sky-high battle between Crow and Greiger heats up, Crow looks to elevate his game in order to ground Greiger's aerial attacks before they send him to the Netherworld forever.
programme.sub-title: A Whale of a Ride, Part 2

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: A Whale of a Ride, Part 3
programme.desc: With his life points on the line, Crow turns to his feathered friends in a last ditch effort to take out Greiger's Earthbound Immortal. Can Crow and his Blackwing's rise to the occasion?
programme.sub-title: A Whale of a Ride, Part 3

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: A Score to Settle, Part 1
programme.desc: Haunted by the memories of his last battle with Kalin, Yusei looks to bury the past by agreeing to duel his former friend in a rematch. Can Yusei defeat Kalin and seal the tower that this Dark Signer is guarding?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: A Score to Settle, Part 2
programme.desc: As the rematch between Kalin and Yusei continues, Yusei must find a way to out-think and out-maneuver the dark power of Kalin's Earthbound Immortal before it sends him to the Netherworld forever.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Destiny's Will, Part 1
programme.desc: Roman challenges Yusei to a Shadow Duel at the site of the original Ener-D Reactor. Meanwhile, Director Goodwin decides to make an unexpected visit to the Satellite Sector to settle some unfinished business he has with his Dark Signer brother.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Destiny's Will, Part 2
programme.desc: As the battle between Yusei and Roman rages on, Roman takes a time out to reveal the truth behind the original Ener-D Reactor's meltdown and the role Yusei's father played.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Shadows of Doubt, Part 1
programme.desc: Jack agrees to Turbo Duel Carly in an effort to defeat the darkness that has taken control of her. Can Jack rid the evil that has come to possess this one-time roving reporter?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Shadows of Doubt, Part 2
programme.desc: Jack kicks his duel into overdrive and summons his Red Dragon Archfiend in a desperate attempt to free Carly from the Dark Signers' control.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Truth and Consequences, Part 1
programme.desc: Hoping to finally find out the whereabouts of her long-lost brother, Misty challenges Akiza to a Shadow Duel in a maze of mirrors.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Truth and Consequences, Part 2
programme.desc: After unlocking Akiza's psychic powers, Sayer sets his sights on using them to get even with the Dark Signers for destroying the Arcadia Movement.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Signs of Doom, Part 1
programme.desc: Yusei, Jack and Crow face off against Goodwin in the ultimate Shadow Duel showdown.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Signs of Doom, Part 2
programme.desc: With the safety of the world hanging in the balance, Yusei, Jack and Crow look to tip the scales in their favor by setting their sights on Goodwin's Earthbound Immortal.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Signs of Doom, Part 3
programme.desc: With his life points running on empty, Yusei looks to rev it up one last time in order to defeat Goodwin and save the world from the destructive powers of the King of the Netherworld!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: A New Threat: Part I
programme.desc: A mysterious new threat arrives on the scene in New Domino City, forcing Yusei to take to the streets and track down a rogue Turbo Duelist known as The Ghost.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: With his life points on the line, Yusei must figure out a way to take down Ghost's Meklord Emperor Wisel before Wisel's special ability throws his game and his runner into a tailspin.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Lessons Learned
programme.desc: When Vice Chancellor Rudolph Heitmann threatens to expel all the members of Leo and Luna's class from Duel Academy, Yusei attempts to teach the teacher a valuable lesson by challenging the Vice Chancellor to a duel to keep his friends in school.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Trash Talk
programme.desc: When Crow is asked to convince an old friend of Martha's to move into her retirement home, Crow decides to tackle the task by challenging the old man to a trash-talking junkyard duel. Can Crow convince the old man to relocate?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: A Duel with Interest
programme.desc: When a loan shark starts sinking his teeth into New Domino City, Jack decides to reel in this money-grubbing menace for good by putting his most prized possessions on the line in a duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Wicked Spirits
programme.desc: When Leo and Luna decide to go exploring a nearby forest rumored to be haunted by wicked spirits, they soon discover that the rumors are all too real when a mysterious boy traps Luna in his house and challenges Leo to a duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: French Twist: Part I
programme.desc: Yusei wakes up to find himself trapped in the back of a big rig with a bump on his head and no way out. After a mysterious tip leads Akiza to Yusei's location, the two friends soon find themselves Turbo Dueling an unfamiliar foe.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: French Twist: Part II
programme.desc: As the battle between Yusei and Sherry races on, Sherry reveals some shocking secrets about the upcoming World Racing Grand Prix. Meanwhile, Akiza begins to gain a new understanding and appreciation for Turbo Dueling while riding shotgun to Yusei.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Synchro Straits
programme.desc: Before heading out to the event of the year - The World Racing Grand Prix Gala - Yusei challenges Jack to a Turbo Duel in the hopes of finding a new dueling strategy that doesn't involve the use of Synchro Monsters.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Synchro Solution
programme.desc: A mysterious duelist named Vizor offers to show Yusei a new dueling strategy known as The Synchro Solution.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Acceleration
programme.desc: Akiza goes to get her Turbo Dueling license, but before she can drive off into the sunset, she first has to out-duel, out-maneuver and out-smart one of Sector Security's finest for her final exam.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Syd is Vicious
programme.desc: After a string of Duel Runner thefts has New Domino City on high alert, Jack Atlas decides to take justice into his own hands and ventures out in search of those responsible.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Dawn of the Duel Board: Part I
programme.desc: When a mysterious new student gives Luna a-one-of-a-kind Duel Board, Leo, trusting his instincts, steps up and tries to pull a 180 on their friendship.
programme.sub-title: Dawn of the Duel Board: Part I

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Dawn of the Duel Board: Part II
programme.desc: As the Duel Board battle between Leo, Luna and the mystery duelist continues, Leo soon realizes that their mysterious opponent is actually an all-too-familiar friend.
programme.sub-title: Dawn of the Duel Board: Part II

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Jack and Crow set out to find a restless Yusei - hoping to ease his mind and reinforce the friendship they share by Turbo Dueling down memory lane.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Super Genius
programme.desc: A mysterious amnesiac helps Yusei build a new engine program for his Runner, but before they can test it out, a make-up-wearing, noodle-eating crook runs off with the file.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Get With the Program: Part I
programme.desc: Yusei and the gang trail Lazar to the local mall hoping to reacquire the engine design program that this window-shopping, noodle-eating crook stole from them.
programme.sub-title: Get With the Program: Part I

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Get With the Program: Part II
programme.desc: Yusei and Lazar are trapped in a warehouse where their only chance of escaping is if Yusei can outduel a Guard Bot whose CPU has been uploaded with all of Yusei's battle techniques.
programme.sub-title: Get With the Program: Part II

programme.title: Cinderella Pact
programme.desc: Nola, Deb, and Nancy are best friends who create a Cinderella Pact—a weight loss agreement using advice from "fairy godmother" newspaper columnist Bel.

programme.title: Knucklehead
programme.desc: After incurring a large debt with a local criminal ringleader, Eddie Sullivan creates a get-rich-quick scheme and enlists a gentle giant named Walter as his unwitting accomplice.

programme.title: The Greatest Inheritance
programme.desc: A group of estranged siblings return home to bury their mother and claim their rightful inheritance. They quickly discover she hid the deed to the entire estate, forcing them to work together and ultimately define their future.

programme.title: The Winning Season: The Winning Season
programme.desc: The story of a washed up basketball coach who must learn to overcome his love of booze and his overdeveloped macho nature in order to re-invent himself as a real man and give a bunch of no-hopers a shot at a WINNING SEASON!

programme.title: Mad Money
programme.desc: Deep inside the most secure bank in America, three desperate women from very different worlds cook up the most unlikely heist of the century: Smuggle out millions of dollars in worn-out currency headed for a Federal Reserve shredder every day.

programme.title: Gloves Off
programme.desc: Following his boxing trainer’s sudden death during his championship fight, Doug has inherited a crumbling debt-ridden gym, packed full of a mixed bag of crazy would-be pugilists.

programme.title: The Greatest Inheritance
programme.desc: A group of estranged siblings return home to bury their mother and claim their rightful inheritance. They quickly discover she hid the deed to the entire estate, forcing them to work together and ultimately define their future.

programme.title: Gigantic
programme.desc: Mattress salesman Brian Weathersby (Paul Dano) falls in love with a woman (Zooey Deschanel) who comes to his store and falls asleep on one of his beds. Also starring John Goodman.

programme.title: Perfect People
programme.desc: After many years of marriage, Ken and Barbara decide to radically change their way of living. In order to become more attractive, they submit themselves to modern diets, exercise, and plastic surgery.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Loud Ghosts of The Hall
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension continue their investigation into Champness Hall and come face to face with paranormal activity that is caught on camera and seek out the paranormal entities haunting the location.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Haunted Theme Park - Part 1
programme.desc: What could be haunting an abandoned theme park in Lancashire? Ghost Dimension seek out paranormal activity in Camelot and they are in for a ride!

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Haunted Theme Park - Part 2
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension continue investigating Camelot Theme Park, the UK's most haunted and come face to face, with a powerful paranormal entity.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Barn
programme.desc: Something Strange is haunting the remains of a colliery in Cheshire and Ghost Dimension head in to uncover the truth behind the activity!

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Evil Spirit in the Cave
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension face a dark sinister ghost inside haunted Caves. Crank caves based in St Helens are said to be the most haunted in the area. Strange paranormal spirits spooky anyone that ventures inside.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Ghost in the Shower
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension investigate Waterloo Rugby Club and come into contact with a very mischievous spirit in the male showers! A ghost that scares away any female that dares to enter.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Streets
programme.desc: Hidden underground for years in Keighley West Yorkshire. Ghost Dimension investigate haunted Victorian Streets, used during the war as bombing shelters.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Crooked House
programme.desc: Deep in Cheshire Ghost Dimension explore a house full of ghostly activity and paranormal goings on. Used to house troops during WW2 as a medical unit.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Secret Nuclear Bunker
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension investigate Hack Green Secret Nuclear Bunker in Nantwich. Something sinister and paranormal seems to be causing havoc inside of the building and tonight it unleashes powerful activity

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Stranger in the Blitz
programme.desc: Damaged during the blitz, the location the team investigate was a former war hospital for the injured and wounded, based in Liverpool, UK.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Prisoner of War
programme.desc: Barrow Green H17 Anti-Aircraft Battery build to protect the Liverpool Docks and general area and a former prisoner of war camp, holds some sinister secrets and Ghost Dimension uncover paranormal activity dating back to WW2. What will be caught tonight?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Ammo Store Explosion
programme.desc: Simonswood Supply Depot was one of the main ammunition depots in Lancashire, England during World War II. Located at Simonswood, it was used as an ammunition depot delivered by ROF Kirkby.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Washed Away Air Raid
programme.desc: This abandoned World War Two air raid shelter holds paranormal secrets that haunt anyone that ventures inside. A ghostly entity makes contacts they team uncover the whats behind the hauntings.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Buried inside the Bombing Decoy
programme.desc: A Second World War bombing decoy site at Formby. It was commissioned in December 1940 as a 'Permanent Starfish' site to deflect enemy bombing from the city of Liverpool and it is now home to a whole host of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: WW2 Hospital Haunting
programme.desc: Built in the early 1900’s and now used as offices, a former world war hospital has become the new home for something supernatural. Strange voices, eerie footsteps and the sounds of painful screams have all been reported. What will be uncovered tonight?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Fort Crosby
programme.desc: Crosby Battery, also known as Crosby Point Battery and Fort Crosby, was an artillery battery situated between Crosby and Hightown in Lancashire, United Kingdom. The battery was used for port defence and anti-aircraft defence during WWII.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Gwrych Castle: Supernatural Gateway
programme.desc: Bex and Sean explore Gwrych Castle in Wales, renowned for its hauntings. Amid eerie voices, strange noises, and shadows, they use specialized equipment to unveil the spectral mysteries lurking within. Will they unearth Gwrych Castle's ghostly secrets?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Gwrych Castle: Secrets of the Unknown
programme.desc: In the thrilling conclusion, Bex and Sean return to Gwrych Castle for intense paranormal investigations. Eerie chambers, mysterious apparitions, and chilling whispers await as they seek conclusive otherworldly proof.
programme.sub-title: Gwrych Castle: Secrets of the Unknown

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Phantoms of Formby: Starfish Bunker Unveiled
programme.desc: Join "Ghost Dimension" at Merseyside's Formby Starfish Bunker. Unveil its wartime secrets, encountering eerie whispers, phantom footsteps, and soldier apparitions. Can they capture undeniable proof of the paranormal?
programme.sub-title: Phantoms of Formby: Starfish Bunker Unveiled

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy view a barn in Kent, a Victorian mansion Lancashire and an old chapel in Wales.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy view properties Gwent, West Sussex and Liverpool.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy view properties in West London, Staffordshire and Kent.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts and Lucy Alexander visit a mid-terrace in Dover.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit an art deco flat in South London, a terraced house on the Isle of Sheppy and a house in Devon.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 11
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit an abandoned property near Wigan, a grand semi detached house in Southampton and a three bedroom house with some odd features in Derby.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 13
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a former army house in Wiltshire that may leave you shellshocked, a three-bed end of terrace lot with a garage and a Staffordshire property with enough bedrooms for a rock band!

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 16
programme.desc: Lucy and Martin travel to Liverpool to see a mid terrace which isn't a blot on the landscape, although it does have one in its garden.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 15
programme.desc: Lucy Alexander and Martin Roberts travel to Dorset to a bungalow surrounded by the beautiful countryside. Then on to Tooting to see a 1st floor flat in urgent need of a face lift. Stoke-on-Trent offers a garage soon to be luxury studio flats.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit properties in Chelsea, Northumberland and London.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy view a terraced house in Burton-on-Trent, a flat in Wimbledon and a detached house in Stockton-on-Tees.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 16
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a property in Lincoln but watch out for the neighbourhood watch systems, a Dorset Cottage where the smell isn't coming from the farm and a two bedroomed house in Warrington.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy view a maisonette in Berkshire, a flat in Tottenham and an end-of-terrace in Wales.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 14
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a property in Preston, a property in Southsea and a terraced house near Durham with a surprise.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit homes in Crewe, Kent and Islington.

programme.title: D.O.A.
programme.desc: Frank Bigelow, told he's been poisoned and has only a few days to live, tries to find out who killed him and why.

programme.title: Jabberwocky
programme.desc: A young peasant, with no interest in adventure or fortune, is mistaken as the kingdom's only hope when a horrible monster threatens the countryside.

programme.title: Elvira's Haunted Hills
programme.desc: ELVIRA'S HAUNTED HILLS culls its outragousness from the classic Vincent Price/Roger Corman films of the early 60's along with a little Rocky Horror Picture Show and Fearless Vampire Killers.

programme.title: Nosferatu
programme.desc: Vampire Count Orlok expresses interest in a new residence and real estate agent Hutter's wife.

programme.title: The Crazies
programme.desc: A small rural town finds itself in the grip of an infection which send its hosts into a violent, homicidal frenzy.

programme.title: Satan's Slave
programme.desc: The beautiful and young Catherine is trapped in a remote country mansion with her uncle and sadistic cousin, having nightmares of witches, torture and satanic covens performing unspeakable rituals.

programme.title: Buffalo '66: Buffalo '66
programme.desc: Billy Brown just got out of jail. Now he's going to serve some real time. He's going home.

programme.title: Supervixens
programme.desc: Clint Ramsey has to flee after his wife is murdered by psycho cop Harry Sledge. While travelling, Clint gets sexually harassed on all sides by various voluptuous nymphomaniacs, and it all ends in a literally explosive climax.

programme.title: D.O.A.
programme.desc: Frank Bigelow, told he's been poisoned and has only a few days to live, tries to find out who killed him and why.

programme.title: Hunter: Broken Dreams
programme.desc: An old flame of Hunter's witnesses a murder but withholds information while her husband blackmails the killer.

programme.title: Hunter: Son & Heir
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall investigate a mobster's son who kills an undercover officer, unaware the cop is his half-brother.

programme.title: Hunter: Unacceptable Loss
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall investigate the illegal disposal of poisonous gas that kills a young boy.

programme.title: Hunter: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall's visit to a police psychiatrist regarding a work-related incident reveals a more intimate relationship years before.

programme.title: Hunter: Lullably
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall work with a Scotland Yard Inspector whent the murder of two British prostitutes resembles a string of similar murders in the U.K.

programme.title: Hunter: Final Confession
programme.desc: After serving a 20-year prison term, a convicted murderer hunts down his accomplices who avoided prosecution. One of them has since become a priest.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: When a convicted murderer commits suicide, his vengeful brother holds McCall and the judge she's dating captive, forcing McCall to discover the truth of the case.

programme.title: Hunter: Sudden Withdrawl
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall search for a beautiful woman whose numerous liaisons are linked to a series of bank robberies.

programme.title: Hunter: Second Sight
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall investigate a psychic's deadly premonitions.

programme.title: Hunter: Street Wise - Part 1
programme.desc: As McCall rekindles an old romance, Hunter insinuates himself into a case involving the mysterious theft of a vagrant's Medal of Honor.

programme.title: Hunter: Street Wise - Part 2
programme.desc: As an investigation into a fencing operation leads Hunter to the killer of a fellow officer and friend, McCall weighs the decision to marry and quit the force.

programme.title: Hunter: Deadly Encounters Part 1
programme.desc: Hunter teams with two Metro officers, one of whom is a former adversary, to locate the missing profits of a murdered black-marketeer as Devane considers a post in Metro.

programme.title: Hunter: Deadly Encounters Part 2
programme.desc: Hunter teams with two Metro officers, one of whom is a former adversary, to locate the missing profits of a murdered black-marketeer as Devane considers a post in Metro.

programme.title: Hunter: Where Echoes End
programme.desc: Hunter attempts to clear the name of a fellow detective accused of a lucrative scheme.

programme.title: Hunter: Kill Zone
programme.desc: Hunter and new partner Molenski investigate a series of rape/murders that revive disturbing memories for Molenski.

programme.title: Hunter: The Incident
programme.desc: Hunter and Molenski battle a neighborhood watch group whose members are taking the law into their own hands.

programme.title: Hunter: A Snitch'll Break Your Heart
programme.desc: Molenski battles with the department to protect the identity of an informant as Hunter investigates the death of an adopted boy.

programme.title: Hunter: Oh, The Shark Bites
programme.desc: When a mobster's son is killed, Devane must defend himself from charges of corruption.

programme.title: Euronews
programme.desc: Euronews offers a unique perspective on world events. It empowers people to make up their own mind by delivering factual analysis and a diversity of viewpoints. Because all views matter, Euronews is "All Views".

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 14
programme.desc: Jonny enters the world of professional drifting as competes in the famous Gatebil show in Norway, driving a specially modified BMW M5. To give himself a fighting chance, he first arranges some tuition from the 2011 British Drift Champion Matt Carter.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 5
programme.desc: Jason Plato and Tiff Needell host a battle of the best cheap hot hatches on sale. The Ford Fiesta ST, RenaultSport Clio and Peugeot 208 GTI are all thrashed to the limit before Tiff and Jason reveal the champion.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 18
programme.desc: Tiff is joined by German motoring legend and 'Queen of the Nurburgring' Sabine Schmitz for a head to head battle between our two favourite sports cars of the last year – the BMW M6 and Porsche 911.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 9
programme.desc: Jonny Smith is at the biggest American car show in the world – which takes place just outside a small town in Sweden. He judges the prestigious best in show competition, goes on a late night cruise and tests the brand new Corvette Grand Sport.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 7
programme.desc: Jason Plato and Karun Chandhok test four bare essential sports cars to find out which is the ultimate way to get some track day thrills for around £50,000. The Fifth Gear team test Ford's latest hot hatch, the Fiesta ST.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 6
programme.desc: Jason Plato is joined by ex-Formula One driver Karun Chandhok to battle it out on the track in two of the most sort-after super sports cars; Porsche 911 GT3 RS vs Nissan GT-R Nismo.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 1
programme.desc: Jason Plato and Tiff Needell hold a high octane track test of three brand new super glamorous convertibles from Audi, Maserati and Mercedes. Vicki Butler-Henderson races wheel to wheel with World Superbike hotshot Chaz Davies

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 7
programme.desc: Jonny Smith goes behind the scenes at the gruelling Isle of Man TT motorbike race, and spends the day with TT hero and 19 times winner John McGuinness. Tiff Needell races around the infamous TT circuit in the brand new Subaru BRZ sports car.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 5
programme.desc: Jason Plato is in Iceland being taught how to race a brutal Formula Off-Road buggy up a cliff of volcanic rock by a former champion. Tiff Needell is joined by former Le Mans winner Guy Smith to test a brand new version of Bentley's best selling car

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 18
programme.desc: In this special rally themed show, Jason Plato and Tiff Needell swap race track for rally stage as they learn to master the art of rally driving. They're taught advanced driving skills by triple British Rally Champion Mark Higgins

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 3
programme.desc: Jonny Smith reveals the secrets of 21 st century car crash testing. He goes behind the scenes at a crash test performed by experts EuroNCAP, before conducting his own shocking crash test between a car and a van.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 8
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson is in Denmark experiencing the exciting world of motorbike speedway with triple world champion Nicki Pederson. Jonny Smith visits Ferrari's hi-tech aluminium factory before taking their latest California supercar out

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 10
programme.desc: Jason Plato and Tiff Needell are joined by Ayrton Senna's nephew, Bruno Senna, to conduct their fastest ever track test. They hold a thrilling race between the brand new Porsche 911 Turbo S and two supercar rivals from Noble and Nissan.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 1
programme.desc: In the opening show of the new series Jason Plato and Tiff Needell put two tyre shredding saloons against one another other on the track - the Mercedes AMG C63 S and Alfa Romeo Giulia Quadrifoglio.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 4
programme.desc: Jason Plato and Jonny Smith battle the elements to find out if a caravan or a camper van is the ultimate way to experience the great outdoors. Elsewhere in the show, the team hit the local supermarket to find out about the new Dacia Duste

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 17
programme.desc: Vicki goes behind the scenes of famous Italian car designers Pininfarina – the people who have shaped every single Ferrari of the last 50 years. Tiff is joined by British rally star Mark Higgins in a test of two new SUVs with supercar power figures

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 8
programme.desc: Jonny Smith is in Sweden testing the brand new Volvo S60 Polestar super saloon against its racing car cousin – the competition car of double Swedish Touring Car Champion Fredrick Ekblom.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 4
programme.desc: Tiff Needell enters the opening round of the exclusive Lamborghini Super Trofeo race series – with advice from the man with every petrolhead's dream job – Lamborghini chief test driver Giorgio Sanna.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 11
programme.desc: Jason's in Italy to drive the most talked about hypercar of the year – the 730bhp Pagani Huayra. He's given an exclusive tour of how this incredible machine is made at the company's HQ, and lets the car off the leash on road and track.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Greed
programme.desc: Known as “black widows,” these women kill their spouses, lovers and children for profit. Murder for them becomes a business. Their trade is murder. Their profit? Blood money.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: A lovely lady with an innocent smile, kind eyes, a charming personality? No one would suspect a woman like that would murder. These women don’t look or behave like killers.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Psychopathic killers lurk in society, mostly acting alone. Sometimes fate brings them into contact with another person who shares their cold power to kill.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love Gone Wrong
programme.desc: Love can be beautiful, love can be blind and love can be deadly. Desire and jealousy are powerful forces driving women to dark and horrifying places in their minds.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Greed is one of the oldest motives for murder, and these deadly women are no exception: they’ll do anything to satisfy their need for cash. This is the dangerous world of the fortune hunters.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Married to Murder
programme.desc: To the outside world, their marriages seemed happy. But behind closed doors, there was no domestic bliss. These women wanted out, but getting a divorce wasn’t their preferred option.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: While marriage is meant to be for life, it often ends in divorce. These wives took their marriages vow seriously: "till death do us part."

programme.title: Deadly Women: Hearts of Stone
programme.desc: Deadly Women are not always the ones you expect. They are not the strangers lurking in the dark, they are a young mother, a supportive wife and a grandmother - all killers. Behind their loving masquerade lies a wake of family horror and pain.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Sometimes, when a man and a woman unite, a terrible urge for destruction can awaken in them both. Happy couples become deadly teams, intent on one goal: murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Under His Control
programme.desc: These are love stories with bleak, bloody endings. Blinded by desire, obsessed and malleable, some women fall into lethal relationships with dangerous, controlling men.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These deadly women were consumed by obsessions that overtook their minds and their lives. These women all had a fatal fixation.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Deadly Delinquents
programme.desc: In the tormented mind of a young school girl, jealousy can turn to a murderous rage. These deadly girls turn on their own and kill their friends. This is the brutal world of deadly delinquents.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Baby-Faced Killers
programme.desc: These baby-faced girls may look childish and innocent, but behind their little girl smiles lies a darkness most adults never experience. When their inner turmoil bubbles to the surface, they become unlikely criminals.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Lethal Love
programme.desc: Love is a powerful emotion, one that sits in the core of our soul and fills our lives with hope. But when love turns sour, the results can be deadly. In an act of revenge, these deadly women unite with one common goal, to kill.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Loathe Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Neighbors can be a source of friendship and community comfort. But what happens when a neighbor stops watching out for you, and starts watching you. The sinister minds of these women begin to turn sour and they begin to torment their neighbors.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love Sick
programme.desc: Young love can be a beautiful time, but when jealousy raises its ugly head it can also be deadly. These baby-faced schoolgirls looked pure and innocent, but don’t be deceived.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Killer Kids
programme.desc: For many parents, their children's teen years can be one big headache. But when typical teenage rebellion turns into deadly rage, a parent's love may not be enough to save their life.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Match Made For Murder
programme.desc: When a woman wants more from her husband than he can give, marriage can be a dangerous union. For these deadly women, relationships mean nothing more than a match made for murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love to Death
programme.desc: Love and money are a beautiful marriage, for the lucky ones they create a life of happiness and ease. Unless the love is of money, the bride is a killer, and the groom their victim.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In Alabama, two desperate criminals fled the custody of a local deputy. Eluding authorities, they made their way across the country in a wave of car theft, abduction, and murder.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Without Remorse
programme.desc: A small town without any crime was turned inside out by the arrival of one dangerous stranger. Some killers are cold and calculating; others are impulsive, unpredictable, and hard to pin down.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Predator
programme.desc: In the early 1990's, Washington, D.C., became the murder capital of the nation. Few were left untouched by gang violence, which was ignited by the drug trade. By 1994, that violence would strike at the very heart of law enforcement.

programme.title: The FBI Files: .22 Caliber Killer
programme.desc: In Buffalo, New York, a sniper targeted African-American men. He held a city hostage, and threatened to ignite a racial powder keg. And it looked like others might be following his bloody example.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Betrayed
programme.desc: On the day before Thanksgiving, a mother discovered her ten-year-old son was missing from his school. When a child of separated parents disappears, investigators first look at the family and divorced parents often suspect each other.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Business
programme.desc: Many escape the poverty of India to start new lives in the United States. One turned the American dream into a nightmare. People started turning up dead in New York's Indian community-authorities struggled to link fraud and murder to a powerful man.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Unabomber
programme.desc: For nearly two decades a mathematical genius with delusions of single-handedly destroying industrial society, planted or mailed powerful bombs to unsuspecting innocent victims.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Small Town Terror
programme.desc: In a small Ohio community, an elderly woman and a teenaged boy disappeared. Because they vanished within hours of each other, police believed the cases were linked. But they didn't know how.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Shattered Shield
programme.desc: In a city awash in narcotics the drug lords have all the power even over the police. Corruption in New Orleans grew like cancer, eating away at public safety and threatening to destroy the city. Crooked cops break the laws they were sworn to uphold.

programme.title: The FBI Files: No Remorse
programme.desc: A burning body in a dark alley shed light on a cold-blooded killer. His partners in crime would tell the story, if they lived. In the underworld of the drug trade, even a childhood friend can quickly become an enemy.

programme.title: The FBI Files: A Family Torn
programme.desc: The parents of 11 yr. old Brittany Martinez knew their daughter was no runaway. Something had happened to her, something terrible. When they failed to find Brittany in their quiet Illinois neighborhood, they called the police.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hunter's Target
programme.desc: Over a thousand hunting accidents are reported in the United States each year. Fewer than ten percent of them are fatal. But when one hunter's death seemed suspicious, the FBI was called in to investigate.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Killer Instinct
programme.desc: In the early 1990's, a serial killer stalked lone victims in the dead of night, his hunting ground the suburbs of Washington, D.C., his target, anyone who owned a car.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Brutal Abduction
programme.desc: A Chicago street gang thought they had figured out how to kidnap people for ransom again and again, and never get caught. But their one mistake was they underestimated the Federal Bureau of Investigation.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Lost Boys
programme.desc: In June of 1997, a crime wave swept Iowa like a tornado. It left a trail of robbery, kidnapping, and murder in its wake, and then it moved on. No one knew where.

programme.title: The FBI Files: When Seconds Count
programme.desc: On July 2nd 1994, a 12-year-old girl was abducted from her home in northern California. The FBI knows to act fast, search wide, enlist volunteers. But as the hours slipped by, agents also realized their chances for recovering her alive grew slim.
