programme.desc: Just A Day (Feeder) / Your Betrayal (Bullet For My Valentine) / Change (In The House Of Flies) (Deftones) / Rollin' (Limp Bizkit) / In Too Deep (Sum 41)
programme.sub-title: Feeder / Bullet For My Valentine / Deftones / Limp Bizkit / Sum 41

programme.title: Rock Anthems of the Century: 30 Seconds To Mars / The Killers / Coldplay / Evanescence Ft. Paul McCoy / Red Hot Chili Peppers
programme.desc: Closer To The Edge (30 Seconds To Mars) / Mr Brightside (The Killers) / Adventure Of A Lifetime (Coldplay) / Bring Me To Life (Evanescence Ft. Paul McCoy) / Californication (Red Hot Chili Peppers)
programme.sub-title: 30 Seconds To Mars / The Killers / Coldplay / Evanescence Ft. Paul McCoy / Red Hot Chili Peppers

programme.title: World's Greatest: Coral Islands
programme.desc: The reef systems that gave rise to coral islands support the vast majority of marine species on our planet, but they are under threat. Explore the delicate balance between exploiting and preserving these extraordinary natural wonders.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Timeless Cities & Towns
programme.desc: These cities and towns are special places where the past coexists with the present, creating cultures totally unique to their people and their part of the world and adhering to ancient traditions and while introducing modern innovations.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Mountains
programme.desc: The earth’s fragile crust has folded and faulted, and nowhere are these natural forces more evident than in the world’s great mountains. Explore the highest peaks of the world’s terrain - the rugged realm between heaven and earth.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Sacred Sites
programme.desc: Ancient in architecture and detailed in design, these man-made masterpieces stand as testaments to the strength of human faith. These sites endure as a timeless reminder of resilience, respect, and the need to reflect.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Rivers
programme.desc: Rivers flow freely - beautiful and powerful waterways that underscore the melody of life. As they meander through the landscape, they shape it, wearing down ranges and deepening valleys, eventually flowing out into the sea.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Iconic Buildings
programme.desc: In construction, only a few buildings can be groundbreaking. Vastly different in shape, size, and function, these diverse buildings prove there is no recipe for greatness, just the fundamental ingredients of vision, bravery, and imagination.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Extreme Animals
programme.desc: Extreme Animals features environments hostile to humans, but havens to many animals. Witness gorgeous glow-worms, high flying condors, parched thorny devils, emperor penguins, and polar bears in this journey through life on the edge.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Cruises
programme.desc: There is something seductive about setting sail. Cruises offer us a chance to dip our toes into the 70% of our planet awash with oceans, rivers, and lakes, exploring places that can only be reached by daring to leave the shore.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Island Arks
programme.desc: Cut off from continents, remote islands have become floating arks, attracting migrating species and forging new ones. Take a privileged glimpse into the secret lives of the rare and exotic species that inhabit these lost worlds.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Land Adventures
programme.desc: Most land adventures come with some risk - a chance to confront our deepest fears, resist the pull of the ordinary, and soar into the wild unknown.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Deserts
programme.desc: For all their reputation as inhospitable places, deserts are full of incredible plants and animals that have adapted to the climate. They are bursting with geological wonders that inspire and are home to some of the most life in the world.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Grassland Animals
programme.desc: Grasslands are the great stages of the natural world where large animals play out spectacular lives in clear view of people, including lions, leopards, elephants, rhinoceros, cheetahs, impalas, kangaroos, wallaby, potoroo, bison, and wolves.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Island Nations
programme.desc: Though many are small in stature, they have punched well above their weight on the global stage. Some are rooted in ancient history, while others are only just beginning to realize their full potential.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Volcanic Islands
programme.desc: They've been worshiped and feared over the millennia. But in the wake of drama and destruction, the elements give rise to cultures and nations so beautiful that we've come to know them as the world's greatest volcanic islands.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Jungle Animals
programme.desc: Encounter gorillas and orangutans, killer tree-dwelling pythons, delightful monkeys, awe-inspiring tigers, and millions of land-dwelling red crabs in Australia, the islands of Southeast Asia, Africa, and the Amazon.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Lost Cities
programme.desc: Once powerful and populous centers of influence, these lost cities are providing clues to how our ancestors existed in the world and remind us that ancient civilizations were not so far removed from our own.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Glaciers
programme.desc: Clinging to the world’s highest mountains and forming ice caps on both poles, glaciers leave an impression on the landscape and on all who bear witness to their splendor.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Tooth/D.W. Gets Lost
programme.desc: It's bad enough to wear glasses all the time. But does Arthur have to be the last person in his class to lose his baby teeth? Then, if you think being lost in a humongous department store would scare a four-year-old, think again.

programme.title: Arthur: Buster's Green Thumb/My Fair Tommy
programme.desc: Buster finds out that his collection of old food makes excellent compost--which makes for even better tomatoes! Then, neither of the Tibble twins has ever won the coveted "Good Behavior of the Week" cupcake award.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. Tale Spins/Prunella Gets It Twice
programme.desc: What happens when you combine Greek Mythology with D.W.'s imagination? Then, getting two Polly Locket dolls almost ruins Prunella's birthday party. That, and Francine's bad mood--why, she wouldn't even sing the Happy Birthday song!
programme.sub-title: D.W. Tale Spins/Prunella Gets It Twice

programme.title: Arthur: Binky Barnes, Art Expert/Arthur's Lucky Pencil
programme.desc: It's a nightmare--Arthur and Buster have to work with Binky. On an art project! I mean, what does a bully like Binky know about art? Then, Arthur discovers the secret to success--a pencil that brings good luck to whoever possesses it.
programme.sub-title: Binky Barnes, Art Expert/Arthur's Lucky Pencil

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Weighs In/The Law of the Jungle Gym
programme.desc: When Arthur doesn't fit into his costume for the play, he's shocked to learn that he's gotten "husky-sized." He gets serious about getting in shape. Muffy found the perfect place to take pictures with her new digital camera: the jungle gym.
programme.sub-title: Arthur Weighs In/The Law of the Jungle Gym

programme.title: Arthur: War of the Worms/I Owe You One
programme.desc: Brain is always taking the fun out of Fern's storytelling by correcting her facts, but things gets out of hand when Fern tricks him with a fake story! Buster is always asking for favors. Will he learn the real meaning of friendship?
programme.sub-title: War of the Worms/I Owe You One

programme.title: Arthur: Buster Spaces Out/The Long Road Home
programme.desc: Inspired by footage of the moon landing, Buster wants to go to outer space someday! For now, it'd be cool to build and launch a rocket! Then, after costing Lakewood Elementary the win in a relay race, George wants to redeem himself.
programme.sub-title: Buster Spaces Out/The Long Road Home

programme.title: Arthur: 1001 Dads/Prunella's Prediction
programme.desc: When Buster insists that he will miss the Father's Day picnic because he has other plans, Arthur is convinced that he's really sad and embarrassed about his parents’ divorce. And Prunella predicts a gift of flashpants, the hot new fashion.

programme.title: Arthur: Binky Goes Nuts/Breezy Listening Blues
programme.desc: When Binky discovers that he's allergic to peanuts, he has so many questions, but learns that the best way not to go nuts is to be well informed and to understand his allergy. Much to his horror, Brain gets a "B-" on a test.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Dummy Disaster/Francine and The Feline
programme.desc: When painfully shy George brings a ventriloquist dummy to school, a popular kid is born! Then, Arthur thinks the best pet to have is a dog, and Francine probably would have agreed--that is, until little Nemo, a cute kitten, came along.
programme.sub-title: Arthur's Dummy Disaster/Francine and The Feline

programme.title: Arthur: The World of Tomorrow/Is There a Doctor in the House?
programme.desc: Since Binky's repeating third grade, he's totally dreading Mr. Ratburn's annual class sleepover at the Science Museum. Arthur and D.W. face the ultimate challenge when Mom gets a bad cold and then gives it to Dad!
programme.sub-title: The World of Tomorrow/Is There a Doctor in the House?

programme.title: Arthur: The Friend Who Wasn't There/Surprise!
programme.desc: Muffy embarks on a quest to find her long lost imaginary friend. And then it's Catherine's 16th birthday, and Francine has been cordially UN-invited to the party.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Sells Out/Mind Your Manners
programme.desc: To earn the money for a new video game, Arthur decides to sell his old toys through his school's Web site. The Tibble Twins want to take Grandmother out to dinner, but she'd rather stay home. Is it because of their terrible table manners?

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. Goes To Washington/Arthur's Mystery Envelope
programme.desc: D.W.'s on her way to Washington and she's bored by it all until she gets lost during a tour of the White House. Then, when Mr. Haney gives Arthur a sealed envelope to bring home to Mom, Arthur fears the worst.
programme.sub-title: D.W. Goes To Washington/Arthur's Mystery Envelope

programme.title: Arthur: Popular Girls/Buster's Growing Grudge
programme.desc: Sue Ellen and Fern take a popularity quiz in a magazine and change their personalities to become more likable, but it backfires. And Buster's convinced that his great joke will be the difference between a successful oral report and failure.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. Rides Again/Arthur Makes The Team
programme.desc: In D.W.’s heart lurks one big, gnawing desire--TO GET RID OF THOSE TRAINING WHEELS! Then, can Coach Frensky work with a baseball team where everyone is fighting about who gets to be pitcher and no one wants to practice?
programme.sub-title: D.W. Rides Again/Arthur Makes The Team

programme.title: Arthur: What Scared Sue Ellen?/Clarissa Is Cracked
programme.desc: Sue Ellen's not afraid of much, but when she encounters a really creepy howling noise in the woods, she's scared for real. Then, Grandma Thora has a lot of fun stuff, especially her porcelain doll, Clarissa.
programme.sub-title: What Scared Sue Ellen?/Clarissa Is Cracked

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Underwear/Francine Frensky, Olympic Rider
programme.desc: Arthur thinks it's hilarious when Binky Barnes' pants split during class--until he starts having nightmares about it happening to him. Then, Francine secretly dreams of being an Olympic equestrienne, but first she has to learn to ride.

programme.title: Arthur: Fernfern and the Secret of Moose Mountain/Thanks a Lot, Binky
programme.desc: Fern can't wait to climb Moose Mountain so that she can have adventures like Zutzut, the famous comic-book hero! Then, Binky decides to become "No More Mr. Nice Guy" after not getting thanked for saving Rattles from a dangerous stunt.
programme.sub-title: Fernfern and the Secret of Moose Mountain/Thanks a Lot, Binky

programme.title: Arthur: Francine's Big Top Trouble/George Blows His Top
programme.desc: Francine is sure she will be a star at circus camp. How hard could it be? Then, George is always more than happy to lend his pals whatever they need. But Buster's borrowing gets out of control.
programme.sub-title: Francine's Big Top Trouble/George Blows His Top

programme.title: Arthur: What's Cooking?/Buster's Special Delivery
programme.desc: Celebrity chef Ming Tsai is judging Lakewood Elementary's first-ever cooking contest, and Arthur thinks he has a shot at winning. Then, Buster volunteers to deliver the school mail and finds out that his new job is actually hard work!

programme.title: Arthur: The Election/Francine Goes To War
programme.desc: There’s a mock election in Mr. Ratburn's class, but Muffy takes it seriously. How far will she go to win? Francine can't believe it. She gets in trouble no matter what she does -- thanks to the new nosy next-door neighbor!

programme.title: Arthur: When Duty Calls – Parts 1 & 2
programme.desc: Ladonna finds out the Army is transferring her dad to Oregon, and the whole Compson family is moving again. Fern and the others can tell Ladonna is upset, but don’t know how to help. What can they do to make the transition easier?

programme.title: Arthur: Silent Treatment/Kung Fool
programme.desc: When shy George wonders if any of his friends notice him, he decides he won’t speak to anyone until they do! Fern volunteers to help an elderly neighbor with his household chores, and then discovers his past life as a Kung Fu celebrity.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Goes Crosswire/Sue Ellen And The Brainasaurous
programme.desc: Since they rescued Wilbur Rabbit, Arthur and Muffy have been inseparable. But the rest of their friends are growing tired of the new Arthur. And, Brain's a great partner for a school assignment--unless you wanted to work on it, too!
programme.sub-title: Arthur Goes Crosswire/Sue Ellen And The Brainasaurous

programme.title: Arthur: The Making of Arthur/Dancing Fools
programme.desc: When Matt Damon puts out a call for homemade videos for his TV show, he sets off a frantic rush as Arthur and his gang film their lives. Mrs. Molina is a teaching a dance class for kids. Will Francine and George be the next Fred and Ginger?

programme.title: Arthur: Is That Kosher/Never Never Never
programme.desc: Francine's convinced that she can fast on Yom Kippur, but what about Arthur’s pizza party? D.W learns that giving gifts isn't the only way of showing you care. Featuring the voice of Joan Rivers.

programme.title: Arthur: Cents-less/Buster the Lounge Lizard
programme.desc: Mr. Ratburn decides it's time for his class to learn a little about money. For the entire weekend, no one in the class can spend a cent. Buster has the brand-new Dark Bunny Dark Buggy, complete with grappling hook and voice commands!

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'s Blankie/Arthur's Substitute Teacher Trouble
programme.desc: D.W. has one little secret--her blankie. When it mysteriously disappears, Arthur is pressed into service. Find that blankie--or else! Next, the unbelievable has happened--Mr. Ratburn has gotten sick. And who's going to be the substitute?

programme.title: Arthur: For the Birds/Ungifted
programme.desc: Brain dreams of being the first to spot a rare bird species called the green-tailed grebe, making him famous. Arthur and Buster's friendship is put to the test when Arthur gives away a present that Buster had given him for his birthday.

programme.title: Arthur: The Boy With His Head In The Clouds/More!
programme.desc: All the kids know that George is smart--so why does he sometimes have trouble reading and writing? Then, D.W. is thrilled to be getting an allowance. At last, she'll be rich and powerful!
programme.sub-title: The Boy With His Head In The Clouds/More!

programme.title: Arthur: Love Notes For Muffy/D.W. Blows The Whistle
programme.desc: When Muffy tries to bribe the judges at the school science fair, Francine and The Brain plot revenge. And D.W., a newly-deputized Junior Safety Officer, has a reputation for being a strict enforcer of the rules--well, OK, a tattle-tale.
programme.sub-title: Love Notes For Muffy/D.W. Blows The Whistle

programme.title: Arthur: Lend Me Your Ear/The Butler Did It
programme.desc: Arthur, Buster, and Brain are worried when Mr. Ratburn isn't acting like himself. He's always pleased to see them, so what’s made him change? When Mr. Crosswire gets a robot butler for Father's Day, Muffy fears Bailey may be replaced.
programme.sub-title: Lend Me Your Ear/The Butler Did It

programme.title: Nazi Hunters: Adolf Eichmann
programme.desc: Nazi Hunters examines the capture of Adolf Eichmann considered by many to be one of the main architects of the Holocaust. Eichmann was captured outside of his home near Buenos Aires in Argentina by Mossad agents.

programme.title: Nazi Hunters: Klaus Barbie
programme.desc: Nazi Hunters looks at how the husband and wife team of Serge and Beate Klarsfeld worked tirelessly to have Nazi war criminal Klaus Barbie extradited from Bolvia to stand trail in France.

programme.title: Nazi Hunters: Erich Priebke
programme.desc: Nazi Hunters examines how, a half-century after the war, American journalists track down former Gestapo officer Erich Priebke. Priebke who was responsible for some of Italy's worst atrocities fled to Argentina after the war.

programme.title: Nazi Hunters: Joseph Mengele
programme.desc: Nazi Hunters examines how Mossad agents from Israel spent nearly thirty years tracking the notorious Nazi physician Josef Mengele. After the war, Mengele flees to Argentina where he lives a relatively nondescript life.

programme.title: Nazi Hunters: Kurt Lischka
programme.desc: Nazi Hunters looks at how German housewife Beate Klarsfeld and her husband Serge helped track down former Paris Gestapo chief Kurt Lishka. Lishka ordered the arrest and murder of over 33,000 Jews.

programme.title: Nazi Hunters: Paul Touvier
programme.desc: Nazi Hunters examines how French investigators hunted down Paul Touvier a pro-Nazi sympathizer who was responsible for murdering both Jews and resistance fighters.

programme.title: Nazi Hunters: Franz Stangl & Gustav Wagner
programme.desc: Nazi Hunters examines how Nazi hunter Simon Wiesenthal tracked down fugitive war criminal Franz Stangl in Brazil. Stangl was responsible for the murder of over 800,000 people.

programme.title: The Dambusters: Episode 1
programme.desc: Aircrew have eight weeks to train for a top secret mission.

programme.title: The Dambusters: Episode 2
programme.desc: Barnes Wallis has to create an entirely new aiming device.

programme.title: The Dambusters: Episode 3
programme.desc: The raid on Germany's dams gets off to a rocky start.

programme.title: World War Two: Total War: A Terrible Precedent
programme.desc: Each episode looks at a different aspect, starting with an exploration of the portents of total war to come and moving through to preparations for war, followed by invasion, occupation and resistance and how total war enabled the Holocaust.

programme.title: World War Two: Total War: Arsenal of Democracy
programme.desc: Each episode looks at a different aspect, starting with an exploration of the portents of total war to come and moving through to preparations for war, followed by invasion, occupation and resistance and how total war enabled the Holocaust.

programme.title: World War Two: Total War: Unprecedented, Unmerciful and Unrelenting
programme.desc: Each episode looks at a different aspect, starting with an exploration of the portents of total war to come and moving through to preparations for war, followed by invasion, occupation and resistance and how total war enabled the Holocaust.

programme.title: World War Two: Total War: Fear of the Air
programme.desc: Each episode looks at a different aspect, starting with an exploration of the portents of total war to come and moving through to preparations for war, followed by invasion, occupation and resistance and how total war enabled the Holocaust.

programme.title: World War Two: Total War: Rejoice in Life
programme.desc: Each episode looks at a different aspect, starting with an exploration of the portents of total war to come and moving through to preparations for war, followed by invasion, occupation and resistance and how total war enabled the Holocaust.

programme.title: World War Two: Total War: Enduring Peace
programme.desc: This final episode reflects on the aftermath of total war.

programme.title: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: To commemorate the 70th Anniversary of the Battle of Britain Ewan and Colin McGregor take to the skies to discover how; against the odds, the RAF inflicted Hitler's first defeat of WW2.

programme.title: D-Day: Secret Raids That Won The War
programme.desc: Examining the RAF 617 squadron and their history of operations throughout the war.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Artis & Jess
programme.desc: Five months ago Artis met Jess online. Artis and Jess each were in relationships, but believed they'd found true love. But is Jess everything that she says she is?

programme.title: Catfish UK: Luke & Amy
programme.desc: Drummer Luke first started talking to nurse Amy when she came to one of his gigs 6 months ago. They had an instant spark but unfortunately every time they try and meet she cancels. (S2, ep9)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Antoinette & Albert
programme.desc: A year after meeting 'T-lights' on Instagram, 'instaceleb' Antoinette is ready to meet him, but he always brushes off the idea. Is he really the online celebrity he claims to be?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Nick & Melissa
programme.desc: Nick and Melissa fell in love at age 12 when they met on an online chat room. Now 18, Nick is ready to meet Melissa. But is Melissa the real deal or has Nick been entangled in lies?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Keyonnah & Bow Wow
programme.desc: Superfan Keyonnah can hardly believe her luck, she's almost certain that she's been having an online relationship with her childhood crush, the rapper Bow Wow. Is this too good to be true?

programme.title: Catfish UK: Angelica & Jeroen
programme.desc: Angelica's been speaking to Jeroen online for three and a half years. After several failed attempts to meet, she's now desperate to find out if Jeroen is real? (S2, ep5)

programme.title: Catfish UK: Rob & Sarah
programme.desc: Oobah is joined by Nathan Henry to help Rob track down his soulmate, Sarah. After two and a half years, Sarah has suddenly gone quiet and it's up to Oobah and Nathan to investigate. (S2, ep7)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Dorion & Jeszica
programme.desc: Dorion is about to give up everything for online love Jeszica, including his relationship with girlfriend Raffinee. But first he wants to know, is Jeszica really the girl in the pictures?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Rico & Ja'Mari
programme.desc: Rico wants to move to England to care for his ailing mother, but his intense online relationship with Ja'mari, an international male model, is giving him second thoughts about leaving.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Kya & Alyx
programme.desc: In this episode we meet Kya and Alyx, who fell in love quickly after meeting online. Are they being honest with each other? Hosts Nev Schulman and Max Joseph investigate.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Sydney and Ayissha were in an online romance for years before Sydney revealed she is not who she says. But Ayissha still loves her and seeks Nev and Max's help.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Artis & Jess
programme.desc: Five months ago Artis met Jess online. Artis and Jess each were in relationships, but believed they'd found true love. But is Jess everything that she says she is? (S2, ep9)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Trina & Scorpio
programme.desc: Trina is a dancer who always had trouble meeting trustworthy guys, until she met Scorpio, a fellow dancer, online. Will Trina finally get to rendezvous with the only man she's ever loved? (S1, ep2)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Dorion & Jeszica
programme.desc: Dorion is about to give up everything for online love Jeszica, including his relationship with girlfriend Raffinee. But first he wants to know, is Jeszica really the girl in the pictures? (S2, ep5)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Aaliyah & Alicia
programme.desc: Aaliyah has been able to share her life struggles with Alicia. However, despite living only 70 blocks away, Alicia refuses to meet her as she hasn't come out to her friends and family yet. (S2, ep11)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Joe & Kari Ann
programme.desc: Joe was sceptical when Miss Teen USA, Kari, sent him a friend request. Now, after months of communication, Joe thinks it might be the real deal, and he might have found love with her. (S1, ep7)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Solana & Elijah
programme.desc: Solana is in a relationship with Danny but can't stop thinking about her online love Elijah. His photos were used in so many profiles that she has to know is this the real Elijah? (S3, ep7)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Brittany finds love online with Bryon, a marine who may get deployed again to Iraq, she seeks Nev and Max's help before she runs out of time to discover if the perfect military man is real.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: While Prophet, of Grammy-nominated Nappy Roots, is making his rap career comeback, he connected online with Trinity. Prophet's ready to settle down, but is this beauty too good to be true?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Miranda & Cameryn
programme.desc: After years of online chats Miranda discovered that Cameryn was not the man he claimed to be. She confronted him only to be given another suspicious profile. Is he someone else entirely? (S3, ep8)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Felipe & Jasmine
programme.desc: Single father Felipe is ready to settle down with Jasmine. However, the two have been talking online for eight months and have never met. Max returns and joins Nev to investigate. (S4, ep6)

programme.title: The City: The L Word
programme.desc: Whitney gets mixed signals from Jay and decides to ask him directly where she stands. Erin's new boyfriend comes to visit and Whitney realizes it's time to find her own apartment. (S1, ep3)

programme.title: The City: Good Things Come In Threes
programme.desc: Whitney dates a new guy and Jay confesses to Adam his true feelings about Whitney. (S1, ep4)

programme.title: The City: Boys Night Out
programme.desc: Adam lets loose while his girlfriend Allie is out of town, but when she hears he kissed another girl from Whitney and the others, Adam finds himself in hot water. (S1, ep5)

programme.title: The City: He Never Said He Had a Girlfriend
programme.desc: Allie breaks down after a run in with the girl who claims she kissed Adam, but Adam sticks to his story to win Allie back, and Whitney gets upset with Jay for taking Adam's side. (S1, ep6)
programme.sub-title: He Never Said He Had a Girlfriend

programme.title: The City: The Truth Hurts
programme.desc: Kelly Cutrone accuses Allie of being too skinny, and Whitney finds herself caught in the middle. Erin runs into an ex-boyfriend and old feelings begin to return. (S1, ep7)

programme.title: The Hills: Season Finale
programme.desc: In Lauren's final episode, she must decide if she'll forgive Spencer and go to the wedding. The drama in the pews beats that at the altar, until a surprise guest shocks everyone! (S5, ep10)

programme.title: The Hills: It's On Bitch
programme.desc: Kristin's attempt to reconnect with her Hollywood friends goes awry when she angers Audrina by hitting on Justin. Heidi and Spencer embark on married life by house shopping. (S5, ep11)

programme.title: The Hills: Mess With Me, I Mess With You
programme.desc: After being stood up by Audrina, Kristin decides to stop fighting her attraction to Justin. Heidi wants to babysit a neighbour's child, but Spencer wants nothing to do with kids. (S5, ep12)
programme.sub-title: Mess With Me, I Mess With You

programme.title: The Hills: Strike One
programme.desc: Kristin gets a taste of being in a relationship with Justin when he bails on Brody's party, while Audrina goes on a date. Heidi and Spencer argue about when to start a family. (S5, ep13)

programme.title: The City: Mingling with the Commoners
programme.desc: Olivia invites Jay's band to perform at one of her charity events but her plan backfires when the band is disrespected on-stage, leaving Whitney and Olivia at odds. (s1, ep8)

programme.title: The City: Unexpected Roommates
programme.desc: Adam kicks Jay out of his apartment so Allie can move in & Jay asks Whitney if he can live with her. Erin's plan to juggle two guys backfires & leaves her alone on New Year's Eve. (S1, ep9)

programme.title: The City: The Past Catches Up
programme.desc: When the gang goes to Miami for the weekend, Jay runs into his ex-girlfriend Danielle and Whitney wonders if the rumours about them might be true after all. (S1, ep10)

programme.title: The City: Fool Me Twice, Shame On Me
programme.desc: Whitney's crushed to learn that Jay's mysterious night out was spent with his ex-girlfriend, Danielle. Olivia steals the credit from Whitney when they style an ELLE cover shoot! (S1, ep11)
programme.sub-title: Fool Me Twice, Shame On Me

programme.title: The City: I'm Sorry Whit
programme.desc: When Jay finds out he's going on tour, Whitney isn't willing to give up on the relationship, but when Jay doesn't give her a choice their relationship ends in a tearful goodbye. (S1, ep12)

programme.title: The City: Finale
programme.desc: Fresh from a breakup with Jay, Whitney questions if she made the right decision leaving LA. An opportunity opens up at work, but Olivia is after the same position. (S1, ep13)

programme.title: The City: Sleeping With The Frenemy
programme.desc: Olivia's working at ELLE Magazine, but meets her match in co-worker Erin Kaplan. Whitney returns to work for Kelly Cutrone, & an old friend's in town, looking to crash with her. (S1, ep14)

programme.title: The City: Working Girls
programme.desc: Whitney wonders if working with a friend is a good idea when Roxy steps out of line on day one. Olivia wins Joe Zee's approval on a new project at ELLE, but Erin isn't impressed. (S1, ep15)

programme.title: NEW Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: What's In the Bag?
programme.desc: After five years apart, our favorite guidos are reuniting in Miami for a family vacation, but The Situation's legal issues have put his vacation in jeopardy.

programme.title: NEW Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: The Ring
programme.desc: In this spectacular episode, Ronnie and Deena's unresolved issues resurface, and the family is complete with the arrival of The Situation.

programme.title: NEW Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: Sunday Vinday
programme.desc: Ronnie clogs all the toilets in the house, and Nicole and Vinny's past jeopardizes their friendship

programme.title: NEW Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: Ron Ron Juice
programme.desc: A night of Ron-Ron Juice has the whole house on full tilt, and a French girl at the club has Ronnie questioning everything.

programme.title: NEW Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: About Last Night
programme.desc: Ronnie is in full on spiral mode after a night of epic bad decisions, and Mike has big news to share.

programme.title: NEW Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: Meatball Down
programme.desc: Vinny has a disastrous run-in with a pair of clippers, guys night is crashed by a drunken meat ball, and Ronnie's got a call to make to his baby mama.

programme.title: NEW Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: Baby Mama Drama
programme.desc: Vinny puts his relationship in jeopardy when he tries to pick up a stripper, and the whole house in on edge with the arrival of Ron's baby mama, Jen.

programme.title: NEW Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: The Temptation of the Keto Guido
programme.desc: Snooki gets caught stealing from a stripper, Vinny is feeling tempted and might sin, and Pauly D is looking for love.
programme.sub-title: The Temptation of the Keto Guido

programme.title: NEW Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: Umm, Hello
programme.desc: It's boys weekend, and the girls are headed home to see their loved ones. With the girls away, Pauly decides to invite their old roommate, Angelina, to Miami.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 211
programme.desc: Hairdresser Luna must hell his best friend Lola how much he likes her. Carleen is readu to let Jessica know her true feelings.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 212
programme.desc: Biana needs to tell her best friend of 10 years that she's in love with him. Tanner will come clean with his true feelings for his best friend.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 213
programme.desc: Lauren has a major crush on best friend Travis, but worries it will wreck the friendship. Chris has to let co-worker Terra know he has feelings for her before it's too late.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Devil's Twin
programme.desc: Identical twin brothers suspected of committing a murder after studying a crime show on TV.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Mystery of Slide Mountain
programme.desc: A report that examines evidence and unanswered questions regarding a June 1, 1998 auto accident on Slide Mountain, near Reno, Nevada, that led to the death of Rinette Riella Bergna and left the driver, Rinette’s husband Peter with only minor injuries.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Soldier's Wife
programme.desc: A soldier claims the fatal shot he fired into the back of his young wife's head was an accident, but prosecutors say he did it intentionally in a fit of jealousy.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Perfect Family
programme.desc: A young man is on trial for the murder of his mother.

programme.title: 48 Hours: To Catch a Stalker
programme.desc: Fifteen-year-old Penny Chang of Shaker Heights, Ohio was stalked and killed by her older brother’s best friend, 21-year-old Scott Strothers.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Who Killed Jane?
programme.desc: Jane Neumann was found dead of a gunshot wound in the basement of her home in Hudson, Wisconsin. Jane's husband Jim originally told police Jane was murdered by an intruder and then later changed his story and said she committed suicide.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Follow the Money
programme.desc: In April 2006, Andrew Kissel, a real estate mogul who had embezzled more than $40 million, was found tied up and stabbed to death in the basement of his Greenwich, Connecticut mansion, just days before he was to plead guilty for his crimes.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Driven to Extremes
programme.desc: Authorities investigate a case of love, infidelity, road rage and possible murder in Texas.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Whether a true crime television show influenced the investigation of an alleged rape and murder case in Atlanta.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Mortician, The Murder, The Movie
programme.desc: When an elderly millionaire is found dead in a freezer, her decades-younger companion is brought up on murder charges; the movie inspired by the story, \Bernie.\
programme.sub-title: The Mortician, The Murder, The Movie

programme.title: 48 Hours: Natalie Wood: Death in Dark Water
programme.desc: Los Angeles County Sheriff's investigators talk about the drowning death of actress Natalie Wood and suspicions about her then-husband, actor Robert Wagner.
programme.sub-title: Natalie Wood: Death in Dark Water

programme.title: 48 Hours: Strange Truth
programme.desc: In March 2003, Ramona Krotine left an office party and was never seen alive again. 24 hours later, she was found in the trunk of her car, beaten and shot to death. At first, police suspected a botched robbery but later believed her husband was to blame.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Deadly Prophecy
programme.desc: Faylene Eaves, divorced Arizona mother of two, married Doug Grant, a divorced single dad, in 1993. They were both Mormons. Faylene had revelations from God that could have contributed to her death, however her husband was found guilty of murdering her.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Psychiatrist and the Selfie
programme.desc: The case against Jacob Nolan, who claims his cousin and psychiatrist, Dr. Pamela Buchbinder, brainwashed him into attempting to kill her former lover, fellow psychiatrist Dr. Michael Weiss.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A defense team and cutting-edge forensic animators strategize to defend a young woman accused of murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Dirty Little Secrets
programme.desc: In April 2006, Matt Baker, a pastor from Waco, Texas, returned home to find his wife Kari unconscious, with an empty bottle of Unisom and a suicide note beside her. Police ruled it a suicide. However, her family believed otherwise.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Death in the Parsonage
programme.desc: An apparent suicide in a Pennsylvania church exposes a pastor's secret.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: DNA on one of two teenage girls killed in a similar fashion on a California beach six years apart leads investigators to a suspect who worked inside the police department.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Eleven Hundred Miles to Murder
programme.desc: Authorities first suspect the husband in the savage murder of a Florida doctor, but when he has an alibi, they follow a tip on a 1,100 mile trip that takes the case in an unexpected direction.

programme.title: 48 Hours: For Love or Money?
programme.desc: Celeste Beard claims she is innocent of the murder of her husband Steven Beard, co-founder of an Austin television station. After a life of abuse and depression, Celeste married Beard. In October 1999, Beard was fatally shot while lying in bed.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Jon’s bumbling cousin comes to stay. Garfield is turned into a werewolf.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: A ghost takes over Jon’s house. Roy tries for a job on a different show.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: The Mail Animal/Peanut-Brained Rooster/Mummy Dearest
programme.desc: Garfield gets their mailman fired./Roy can't get enough of the latest crop of peanuts./Garfield dreams he's in ancient Egypt.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Lemon Aid/Hog Noon/Video Airlines
programme.desc: Jon wins a free car./A school mate is coming back to settle an old score./Jon decides to go to a video store.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Astrocat/Cock a Doodle Duel/Cinderella Cat
programme.desc: Garfield's relative was the first cat to land on the moon./A rooster arrives from another farm./Garfield's fairy Godfather makes him an offer.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: The ancestor of one of the most hungry pirates sets sail. Philo is back to help give motivational speeches to the weasel and Wade.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Attention-Getting Garfield/Swine Trek/Dog Food
programme.desc: Floyd, the mouse, shows Garfield how to get noticed./Orson dreams he is captain of a starship./Garfield tells Odie how they make dog food.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Count Lasagna/Mystery Guest/Rodent Rampage
programme.desc: Jon tries to sell a story about vampire and his cat./Roy holds a phone-in contest./Garfield won't chase mice.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Weighty Problem/U.S. Acres: The Worm Turns/Good Cat, Bad Cat
programme.desc: Garfield tampers with the new talking scale./Booker's hunt for worms comes to a stop./Garfield's good and bad side battle for control.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Skyway Robbery/The Bunny Rabbits Coming/Close Encounters of the Garfield Kind
programme.desc: Jon decides to fly Swindler Airlines to Miami./A mysterious message arrives./A friendly alien lands in Jon's backyard.
programme.sub-title: Skyway Robbery/The Bunny Rabbits Coming/Close Encounters of the Garfield Kind

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Irwin the Mouse wants to be cast and Garfield lets him be one. Wade visits the Sage on a mountain to see how to overcome his fears.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Jon has an auto accident and must deal with mechanics and insurance agents.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: To impress a girl, Jon takes her to see a dangerous game show.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield relates the tale of a lousy Italian chef (Jon). The Buddy Bears present a cultural moment.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Floyd wants to do the show but Jon’s is the scheduled guest.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: When Jon is set-up for humiliation by a dating game TV show, Garfield comes to the rescue.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: The Idol of Id/U.S Acres: Bedtime Story Blues/Mama Manicotti
programme.desc: Garfield's and Odie's minds are switched./Orson tries to read Cinderella to Booker and Sheldon./Garfield helps a small restaurant owner battle a large chain.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield’s neighbor moves out and rent their house to a singer.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Binky Gets Cancelled Again/Orson's Diner/Flat Tired
programme.desc: Binky loses his show to The Buddy Bears./Orson and Wade open a diner./Garfield is too tired to do the show.
programme.sub-title: Binky Gets Cancelled Again/Orson's Diner/Flat Tired

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Come Blow Your Horn!
programme.desc: Barney and the kids are excited because five of Mr. Boyd's brass-playing buddies are putting on a show in the park tonight! Angela is learning to play the trumpet and knows that it takes a lot of practice. BJ arrives and the group visits the caboose.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Spring Into Fun!
programme.desc: It's a rainy spring day, and the children can be found inside painting and creating. Barney arrives, explains the differences amongst the seasons, and suggests playing outside in the rain. The rain is soon replaced by sunshine and a rainbow.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ learns a lesson about bragging when, playing superhero CAPTAIN PICKLES, he tells everyone that he can leap over the moon!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Bienvenido, Barney!
programme.desc: Baby Bop's friend Monty the butterfly passes through the park with a flock of friends on their way to Mexico. When Monty gets left behind by his insect friends and family, Barney takes everyone on a visit to Mexico.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: At Home in the Park
programme.desc: The children work together to make a bird house. They are happy to learn that the bird will have lots of company; many animals make their homes in the park too!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: BJ's Really Cool House
programme.desc: Although the park may be a home away from home for Barney and his friends, BJ wants to build his own "totally awesome, completely cool" house. While BJ works on his house, Barney and the children learn all about houses and homes.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: A creepy spider inspires Barney to tell the story of “The Reluctant Dragon.”

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A-Counting We Will Go!
programme.desc: Barney and the kids help Baby Bop count to ten by playing games, and visiting a Make-Believe Market.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Bonjour Barney!
programme.desc: Emma wants to paint an award-winning painting for the "Art In The Park Show," but she is just isn't satisfied with her artwork. Barney takes her to France to learn how to paint from his friend Pierre.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney helps BJ see that we don't forget old friends when we make new ones. Ryan and his Grandpa have a great day in the Park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Who's Your Neighbor?
programme.desc: Through pretend play, Barney and the children learn about their community and the people that help them live safely and happily there.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: It's Hot! It's Cold!
programme.desc: Throughout the day, Barney and the children learn about "hot" and "cold," but the fun really begins when Barney turns the playground into a winter/summer wonderland!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Making a Move
programme.desc: Welcome to the neighborhood! Anna has just moved to the neighborhood and is missing her old friends. Barney and his friends help her discover that moving is an adventure with new places to explore and new friends to meet.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Picture of Friendship
programme.desc: After a brief misunderstanding, BJ realizes he has many friends. He enjoys a day playing with Barney and the children.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When Baby Bop thinks the half-moon is somehow broken, Barney and Friends take an imaginary visit to the moon where Barney eases her concerns.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A New Friend
programme.desc: While Barney has fun with his friends every day, there's something special about making a brand NEW friend! When Mr. Boyd's niece, Colleen visits the park, she's eager to make friends with the other kids...but being the "new kid" isn't easy.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: My Family and Me
programme.desc: The children are invited to a family picnic in the park, but don't know who invited them. The invitations instruct them to bring a family treasure, so each child has something special with them. Barney helps lead a discussion about families.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The Emperor's Contest - The Whole Truth
programme.desc: Everyone is excited about a fishing contest that is being held in the park; everyone except Ryan, who doesn't want to follow the contest rules. When Ryan is tempted not to follow the rules, Barney tells a story called "The Emperor's Contest."
programme.sub-title: The Emperor's Contest - The Whole Truth

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Bird of a Different Feather
programme.desc: Barney takes the kids to Hawaii on a quest for a bird of paradise. While there, they meet some friends, learn new Hawaiian words, make a Hawaiian lei and dance a hula! Eventually, Barney and his friends find a bird of paradise.
programme.sub-title: A Bird of a Different Feather

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop meets a new girl named Jill who doesn’t want to join the fun.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Best In Show - Ducks And Fish
programme.desc: When the kids decide to have a Dog Show to show off their pets, BJ feels a little left out. He doesn't have a dog, and he sure wishes he did! A friend from the park shares her dog with BJ so he can join in the fun.
programme.sub-title: Best In Show - Ducks And Fish

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: As he watches birds fly overhead, Riff begins to daydream of flying himself. After seeing all the Moms playing with their kids in the Park, Baby Bop wonders what makes somebody a Mommy.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Pistachio - BJ Snack Attack
programme.desc: Barney is snacking on pistachios...and just can't seem to stop! His young friends try to help by hiding them from Barney. When that doesn't work, they tell him a story to help him stop eating pistachios.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ brings his brand-new toy plane to the park. Baby Bop is having a great time playing with her homemade boat.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: All About Me
programme.desc: Baby Bop and BJ have fun playing ball in the park. Barney helps them learn that trying something new can also be fun. Baby Bop prepares a special picnic for BJ, but much to his surprise, it consists mostly of her favorite foods.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Cousin Riff is moving to town. Barney encourages everyone to put on a special show.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The New Kid - The Princess And The Frog
programme.desc: When Riff meets a new friend in the park, BJ feels a little left out. BJ goes to great lengths to try to find a new friend for himself. Barney helps BJ see that we don't have to forget old friends when we make new ones.
programme.sub-title: The New Kid - The Princess And The Frog

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Big Little Day
programme.desc: Barney helps Baby Bop and the children discover big and little things in the world around them. And by the end of the day, the kids have learned that big or little, they're all wonderful just the way they are!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The Blame Game - Airplanes
programme.desc: Marcos accidentally breaks an art show project that Melanie has made. Afraid that she will be angry, he doesn't say anything, but then feels guilty. Barney helps him see that honesty and taking responsibility for what we do is always best. together.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Everybody's Got Feelings
programme.desc: Barney helps Baby Bop and BJ learn that everyone has feelings—happy, sad, angry—and sometimes all those feelings can be experienced in just one day.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: On the Road Again
programme.desc: Barney and his friends have a "wheel good fun" day learning about cars. Barney creates a colorful, kid-size car, the dinos learn about seatbelt safety, and everyone discovers there are many different styles of cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gold 'n' Gloves
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes toe-to-toe with Ton's evil twin! They find a medieval catapult designed for storming castles and Ton uncovers a hidden collection of gold bars worth thousands of dollars!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Drumming Up Cash
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face some silent but deadly competition at an auction in nearby Glendale. They discover a Zildjian brand percussion cymbal from the 1940's and a pyrotechnics control board designed for large-scale fireworks displays!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Disco and Dice
programme.desc: 1978 Williams Disco pinball machine; 1898 dice popper gambling device; talking 1990s bar top breathalyzer; deadly fishing harpoon.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Smoking Ton
programme.desc: WW2 Stuart M3 tank barrel and heavy duty tank treads; rare, collectors' 1890 silver inlayed humidor; high-end industrial meat slicer in the ultimate restaurant unit.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Ruff Day
programme.desc: Ton and Allen head to an auction in Ton's hometown and end up battling with a big-mouthed buyer. They discover a pair of tranquilizer dart guns and also end up fighting with a K9!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sidecar Surprise
programme.desc: An unassuming mom in an oversized sweater tries to pull the wool over Ton & Allen's eyes at a storage auction in Arlington, VA. The guys uncover a black powder cannon designed in the 15th century & a Russian military motorcycle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Strat'ed for Cash
programme.desc: On a limited budget in the historic L.A. neighborhood of West Adams, Allen and Ton still win three lockers and find a Maui Blue Fender Stratocaster and a 1930s Schwinn bike.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Weapons of Past Destruction
programme.desc: Knowing that Hollywood auctions are hit-and-miss, Allen and Ton buy inexpensive lockers that contain a polygraph machine, a samurai sword and a pair of Civil War shotguns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hula Moola
programme.desc: Ton and Allen jet to the Hawaiian islands where they're joined by a feisty new female assistant! The team uncovers a pair of James Bond-style gadgets designed for high-speed underwater travel and a vintage sled.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Rodeo Ton
programme.desc: 1970s El Toro mechanical bull used to train bull riders; silver WWII era banjo; a collection of 1800s handcrafted hunting duck decoys.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Chicago Grand Slam
programme.desc: 1984 Yamaha SS440 Snowmobile that introduced the revolutionary shock absorber suspension; rare autographed 1920s baseball glove; mint Hank Aaron signed baseball; authentic 1950s Robby the Robot collector toy.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Big Easy Money
programme.desc: Allen & Ton head to New Orleans in search of easy money, but instead encounter some bayou bidders with big-time bucks! They discover a pair of early 19th-century dueling pistols & a vintage airboat fitted with a turbine engine!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Jersey Score
programme.desc: Ton & Allen attend a silent auction in NJ, but that doesn't stop the local buyers from letting them know they're not welcome! They uncover a skeet throwing machine from the 1960's & a vintage vehicle with some real horsepower!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Hot Commodity
programme.desc: Allen is late to the auction, leaving Ton to battle a feisty female auction buyer on his own! The guys find a fully functional flamethrower and a rare hand-carved bow and arrow set from South America!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sink or Swim
programme.desc: 1905 Hand-crank Thomas Edison gramophone with cylindrical records; a discontinued Addictor 190 Mini Boat; a rare 1897 Regina music box.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fake Punt Payoff
programme.desc: Ton and Allen contend with a large crowd of inexperienced auction-buyers at a huge storage container auction in Pasadena. They find a small fleet of Segway personal transporters and an enormous custom-made shotgun.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Dead Aim
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face-off against an auction buyer with shady bidding tactics and even more questionable fashion sense. The guys find a custom-built monowheel & a rifle designed to ward off grave robbers in the early 19th century!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Driller Instinct
programme.desc: Ton & Allen encounter aggressive outdoorsmen in the Alaskan wilderness. The guys discover an 8-wheeled ATV that travels on both land & water and an air percussion hammer that can drill through solid rock!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Got Balls
programme.desc: After returning to LA, Ton & Allen head deep into hostile auction hunter territory and butt heads with a familiar old foe! They discover a driving range golf ball picker vehicle and one of the most accurate rifles ever made!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Mr. Haff Goes to Washington
programme.desc: Ton and Allen invade the Nation's capital, but meet strong resistance from local bidders. The guys uncover a Civil War era black powder revolver and a stash of South African gold coins!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Great American Cashtime
programme.desc: Rare 1950s Master Pitch baseball machine; 1980s Jaws of Life tool used by rescuers to pry open cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fire in the Hole!
programme.desc: 1930s "blasting machine" dynamite detonator box; 1890s treasure chest with secret compartments. Ton smelts jewelry to forge bricks of silver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Voodoo Moola
programme.desc: Allen & Ton hit a storage auction in Louisiana's Capitol City and quickly find themselves in trouble with the law! The guys uncover a pair of racing lawnmowers and then stumble on an antique barber chair from the early 1900s!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Chi-Town Showdown
programme.desc: Metal Victorian-era burial casket; 1870s glass fire extinguisher grenades; a mechanical 1896 handcrafted Chicago fire station alarm box.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hot Wheels
programme.desc: '70s sand rail dune racer with rally hemi heads; 1965 replica Mustang pool table; off-road racing gear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hidden Hot Wheels
programme.desc: Ton and Allen challenge a big time auction buyer on his home turf. The guys uncover a 1969 Chevelle Malibu muscle car and a single-shot pistol designed to aid Allied resistance fighters during WWII.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Quadzilla Attacks!
programme.desc: Extreme Quadzilla ATV, the fastest 4 wheeler ever; a 1910s Remington Derringer and an 1880s Palm Squeezer pistol; revolutionary 1800s Western Electric telephone with a crank dial.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Battle Bought
programme.desc: Mint 1800s French "Harmonica Pistol" and a collection of '90s remote controlled combat robots.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Early Bird Special
programme.desc: Vintage Shooting Star carnival game; professional Mixed Martial Arts octagon fighting cage.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Top Gun Ton
programme.desc: Scale RC Viper FanJet aircraft with a potent jet engine; 1920s Gundlach Korona large format field camera used for photography expeditions. Ton pilots a plane, but crashes and burns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Half Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: 1970s Z-Flex Jimmy Plumer Poolrider skateboard with artwork by Doug Smith; Kevlar bulletproof vest, ballistic facemask and a helmet used by S.W.A.T. teams; a pair of 1990s racing pocket bikes capable of going 80 mph.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Diesel Digs
programme.desc: The guys head to the industrial hub of LA to score some heavy machinery and unearth a 1981 Bobcat 743 Frontloader, one of the first powered by a diesel engine and a trench-defending WWI German Sturmtrupp helmet bashing mace.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Auction Hunters, Ink.
programme.desc: Autographed 1960s Bob Shaw Swing Gate tattoo machine; Terry Ives competition 22hp chainsaw; six foot chainsaw-carved cedar bear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Miami Heat
programme.desc: All-terrain Air Commander Hovercraft, a 1970s NASA countdown clock and a one-of-a-kind 1960s Delta Relay rocket.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: High Flying Ton
programme.desc: A nerdy auction buyer tests Ton and Allen's patience at a big container auction in Ventura. The guys discover a basket and burners for a hot air balloon and a 19th century German single shot rifle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Friends in Hawaii Places
programme.desc: Allen &Ton enlist an assistant, Carolyn, and Allen's Hawaiian buddy, Junior, to help them battle local buyers. The guys find a WWII-era motor scooter and a stash of antique Polynesian tattoo tools that get used on Ton!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Money Makin' Monster Machines
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes on the attack & ends up on a collision course with a hardened veteran auction buyer. They uncover a collection of speedy off-road vehicles and some hardcore heavy metal from the turn-of the-century!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Viva la Vegas
programme.desc: 1974 death-defying Zig Zag magic sword box, an ultra-rare 1910 poster of the infamous magician Chung Ling Soo, an 1800s naval cane sword and century-old Metlach German beer steins.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangster Whiskey
programme.desc: Allen and Ton trek to an auction in Moreno Valley, CA, where two locker wins yield a vintage jukebox, a valuable baseball card and a Prohibition-era moonshine still.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Trial and Error
programme.desc: Maci wonders if her boyfriend Kyle's ready to date a teen mom. Catelynn's stepdad is court-ordered to go to rehab, leaving her with her mum who guilt trips her over the adoption.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Senior Prom
programme.desc: Maci is heartbroken when Ryan announces he's taking her to court over custody of Bentley. Amber's fun birthday plans are ruined when Gary refuses to babysit.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Hello and Goodbye
programme.desc: Amber and Gary's wedding plans fall apart over an argument about how to raise Leah. Maci finally tells her parents she's moving two hours away with Bentley, but they're not happy.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Family Bonds
programme.desc: Farrah contacts Sophia's dad's family in an attempt to get social security benefits. Maci tells Ryan she's moving to Nashville, and Catelynn and Tyler learn Butch is back in jail.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Lashing Out
programme.desc: Catelynn and Tyler learn they will not graduate on time. Farrah has an emotional reunion with Sophia's dad's sister for the first time since he died, and Amber lashes out at Gary.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Too Much Too Soon
programme.desc: Maci confronts Kyle when she sees her new life in Nashville isn't what she expected. Amber breaks up with Gary and starts dating. Farrah gets the results of Sophia's DNA test.

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: Meet the Mums!
programme.desc: In brand new Teen Mom UK, meet five feisty Brit girls as they juggle babies, boyfriends, careers and broken hearts. It's a roller coaster ride of highs, lows, love and let downs. (S1, ep1)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: Decisions Decisions
programme.desc: Tears, tiffs and true love in Teen Mom UK. Mia has her baby, Megan makes a decision and Amber and Ste argue about the christening. Naomi has a showdown and Chloe's worried about her weight. (S1, ep2)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: Horses For Courses
programme.desc: Amber goes dating, Mia struggles with night feeds, Chloe takes Marley to a modelling session, Dylan buys Megan a horse and Naomi and Raphael's love life hits a rocky patch. (S1, ep3)

programme.title: Teen Mom: See You Later
programme.desc: Catelynn and Tyler have an emotional reunion with their daughter. Amber and Gary try to work out custody of Leah now that they are broken up, and Farrah's mum sets her up on a date.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Catch Up Special
programme.desc: Special episode in front of a studio audience. Maci, Farrah, Amber and Catelynn discuss their ups and downs, achievements and regrets. Last in the series.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Unseen Moments
programme.desc: Dr. Drew hosts an exclusive look at never-before seen laughs, fights and other Season 2 drama with Farrah, Maci, Catelynn, and Amber.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Baby Talk
programme.desc: Maci, Catelynn, Amber and Farrah host a look back at the cutest, most funny, and most difficult baby moments of series 2. They will also discuss their experience as young mothers.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Taking It Slow
programme.desc: Maci confronts her ex about child support; Amber makes a choice; Catelynn and Tyler consider living together; and Farrah considers a big change.

programme.title: Teen Mom: To Be With You
programme.desc: Amber and Gary move in together; Tyler's family questions his decision; Maci considers letting her boyfriend move in; Farrah struggles with the separation.

programme.title: Teen Mom: The Last Straw
programme.desc: Amber learns she is being investigated; Ryan wants to meet Maci's new boyfriend; Sophia's grandmother is suing for visitation rights; Tyler's father gets out of jail.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Trials and Tribulations
programme.desc: Catelynn wants to mend her relationship with her mother; Amber and Gary meet with CPS; Maci decides to move home; Farrah goes to court.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Trick or Treat
programme.desc: Maci and Ryan argue over Bentley on his birthday. Amber has a break down. Farrah struggles to balance Sophia with finishing school credits, and Catelynn and Tyler look for jobs.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Terrible Twos
programme.desc: Gary refuses to celebrate Leah's birthday with Amber, Catelynn goes on a retreat to address fears about the adoption, Farrah gets a puppy, and Ryan discovers that Kyle is living with Maci.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Without You
programme.desc: Farrah and Sophia visit Sophia's father's grave; Amber and her mother argue; Maci struggles to keep up; Catelynn and Tyler want to invite their daughter to graduation. (S3, ep7)

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Kayla
programme.desc: Kayla is a southern belle. Now that she's pregnant, she has to start making her own tough decisions about marriage and her ability to make it without the help of her parents.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Megan
programme.desc: While her dad's in Afghanistan, Megan gets pregnant. But with little money and a video game playing boyfriend not necessarily in for the long haul, she'll have to grow up fast.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Ashley
programme.desc: Ashley is a pregnant high school senior from Texas with no baby daddy weighing in, and a family encouraging her to choose adoption. But when the time comes, what will she decide?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Unseen Moments 2
programme.desc: Unseen moments from the episodes Brooke, Felicia, Emily, Markai, Aubrey, Christinna, Kayla, Megan, and Ashley.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Reunion
programme.desc: Dr. Drew hosts an emotional finale as the teen mothers from the latest series share a stage, coming together with their boyfriends & parents to talk about the issues they face.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Jordan
programme.desc: Jordan and her sister were models and best friends until Jordan's pregnancy put all that on hold. Now her boyfriend and her sister are competing to be her number one.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Jennifer
programme.desc: After abandoning sports and losing her friends, Jennifer has to battle with her over-protective parents to accept her boyfriend before she gives birth to twin boys.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Jamie
programme.desc: Raised by a single mum, Jamie is a straight A student with big plans for the future. But after getting pregnant she struggles to mould her immature boyfriend into the father she never had.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Danielle
programme.desc: After following her mum's footsteps by becoming a teen mum, Danielle strives to prove she can do things differently. But she soon learns she needs help managing school, a job and a baby.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Cleondra
programme.desc: Regarded as the most likely to succeed in her family, Cleondra shocks everyone by getting pregnant so young. Now she faces the tough decision to leave home and move in with her boyfriend.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Kayla
programme.desc: Kayla's anorexia comes back full-force when she is pregnant. While struggling to put looks aside, Kayla realizes that the person she has always relied on, her mother, refuses to support her.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Izabella
programme.desc: After hiding her pregnancy for eight months, Izabella is forced to reconsider who her true friends are. She then risks her family ties when her boyfriend betrays their trust.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Kianna
programme.desc: With an immature boyfriend and a distant mum, Kianna wants more stability for her baby and considers adoption. When no one supports her decision, she must figure out how to be a good parent.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Taylor
programme.desc: Taylor's mum wants her to choose adoption, but Taylor and her boyfriend Nathan feel that they can overcome the challenges of being teen parents.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Allie
programme.desc: A Jersey girl is stuck in Texas after moving in with her boyfriend's dysfunctional family, Allie needs to decide whether to raise her baby in an unstable environment or without a dad.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Reunion
programme.desc: Dr Drew hosts an emotional finale as ten teen mothers share a stage to come together with their boyfriends and parents and talk about the issues they face.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Unseen Moments
programme.desc: Dr Drew hosts a look at the exclusive moments we never saw with the girls from season 3 of 16 And Pregnant.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: An in-depth look at everything that's happened since the cameras stopped rolling on the girls from the first two seasons of 16 and Pregnant.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Prey
programme.desc: A murder victim turns out to be a violent stalker, and the killer may be one of his stalking victims who learned to cover her tracks by attending one of Bonasera's college seminars.

programme.title: CSI: New York: The Past, Present and Murder

programme.title: CSI: New York: Greater Good
programme.desc: As Lindsay goes into labor, Mac suspects that a man who served a prison sentence in a manslaughter case is protecting the actual culprit.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Pay Up
programme.desc: A group of violent kidnappers capture Robert Dunbrook's son just before he is scheduled to testify to a grand jury against his father, and the CSI team is rocked by a tragedy.

programme.title: CSI: New York: The Past, Present and Murder
programme.desc: A man is killed when he falls out a window in media mogul Robert Dunbrook's building, but did Dunbrook throw him? During the investigation, Mac discovers that the case is connected to an earlier case involving a missing flash drive.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Greater Good

programme.title: CSI: New York: Pay Up

programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a string of murders in New York that revolve around an online world, apparently performed by a hit man.

programme.desc: Horatio and the team are trying to figure out how to free an innocent young man after a harsh interrogation with Frank Tripp sends him to jail.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Skeletons

programme.desc: Amir leads Victoria into a trap, the Bros meet a super obnoxious bro, and rival brokers Serge and Gio intimidate Glenn.

programme.desc: Bizarre self help gurus guide the brokers through their pain. Victoria’s got daddy issues, Chelsea and Glenn take things to the next level.

programme.desc: Andrew thinks Baxter might be a killer, Glenn feels disrespected by Dean’s assistant. Victoria meets with a deceptive indie filmmaker.

programme.desc: Amir threatens Dean with knowledge of a devastating secret. Chelsea tries to rid a property of raccoons, Victoria deals with a delusional dog owner.

programme.desc: Stuart recruits Phil for his a cappella group and Phil leads a rebellion. Haskell leaves Holly out of his will and she seeks revenge.

programme.desc: Stuart’s sister Nicki comes back from her European vacation with a female lover. Holly, inspired by Nicki, decides to try dating women.

programme.desc: A team of robbers heist the First Monument Bank and Detective Cyrus Lockwood is shot and murdered. The team investigate the case and find that the thieves wanted a specific safety deposit box in the vault.

programme.desc: A murder appears to be a suicide with very little evidence.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Crate ‘n Burial
programme.desc: The search is on for a abducted woman while a hit and run death of a little girl is investigated.

programme.desc: Catherine, Nick, and Sara investigate a seemingly months old body found in the mountains.

programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine investigate a movie-goer who was stabbed to death.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Forever
programme.desc: The trampling death of a trainer by her horse aboard a private jet is investigated by Grissom, Catherine, and Nick. Sara and Warrick look into a Romeo and Juliet scenario in the desert.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Play With Fire
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara, and Nick investigate the murder of a woman in the press box of a high school stadium.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Inside The Box
programme.desc: A professional bank robbery leads to the death of a detective. While investigating the case, Grissom deals with his hearing loss and another CSI gets a personal revelation.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Pilot
programme.desc: A murder appears to be a suicide with very little evidence.

programme.desc: While investigating the disappearance of Margaret Shorey at a supermarket, Grissom and Catherine stumble upon a serial killer who claims to have killed five women in supermarkets located along the I-15.

programme.desc: Detectives Keogh and Dickie investigate the 2000 murder of Tom Cressman by his lover, Jane Andrews, a former royal dresser who went on the run before claiming in her defence that she had been in an abusive relationship.

programme.desc: Former detective inspector Keogh and the team investigate the murder of retired nurse Eulin Hastings, revealing how police inquiries led to the conviction of serial burglar Aaron Fyle.

programme.title: Secrets of a Murder Detective
programme.desc: Former detective Steve Keogh uncovers secrets in Terry Daddow's 1991 contract killing.

programme.title: New Scotland Yard Files
programme.desc: When Laila Rezk was discovered badly beaten in her own home, she died despite all efforts to revive her. Forensic examination eliminated all traces of fingerprints, except one.

programme.title: New Scotland Yard Files
programme.desc: When police found a man on fire, they assumed he did that to himself. His family campaigned for justice for two years and New Scotland Yard re-investigated the case.

programme.title: New Scotland Yard Files
programme.desc: When Gagandip Singh's body was discovered in a burnt-out car, detectives found out that his father was murdered on a business trip - was there a connection between both deaths?

programme.title: New Scotland Yard Files
programme.desc: When barman David Morley was beaten to death on London's South Bank, lead detective Nick Scola deduced that the attack was not what it first appeared to be.

programme.title: New Scotland Yard Files
programme.desc: When Geeta Aulakh was fatally attacked on the way to pick up her children, detectives tried to find a motive. The case took a new direction after an informant came forward.

programme.title: New Scotland Yard Files
programme.desc: When a string of elderly people were found dead in their beds across south London, New Scotland Yard detectives realised they had a serial killer on their hands.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: 16-year-old high school student Kim Bryant is last seen outside a Dairy Queen restaurant. Three weeks later, her body is discovered by three teenage boys hiking on the outskirts of town.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1987, a man finds his wife brutally murdered on the kitchen floor.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: 17-year old Carla Walker is with her boyfriend Rodney in his car when suddenly the door is ripped open by an unknown assailant. The man beats Rodney with a gun and drags Carla away screaming.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 2001, a seven-year-old girl was abducted on her way to school in Greeley, Colorado, by a stranger who sexually abused her and then released her. Despite all efforts, the perpetrator could not be found for almost 20 years.

programme.title: Murder Wall
programme.desc: At first, a fatal shooting seems like an open and shut case, but something feels off for the investigator who slowly unpicks a web of manipulation and lies.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's Released to Kill
programme.desc: After murdering a Sunday school teacher, David Cook was released from prison after twenty one years behind bars. Tragically, just three years later, he strangled a pensioner to death.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's Released to Kill
programme.desc: Fourteen days after being released from prison, Matthew Williams, a prolific offender with a long history of violence, viciously attacked a young woman.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's Released to Kill
programme.desc: A man is stabbed while helping a neighbour who's being burgled and he tragically bleeds to death. The killer is murderer Ian McLoughlin, out on day release from prison.

programme.desc: Marvyn Iheanacho had only been out of prison for six months before he killed a child. This terrible incident raised questions as to how the child ended up in Iheanacho's care.

programme.desc: Between September 1940 and November 1941, things intensify as Nazi Germany exert their dominance over Europe.
